987_shirt_04.description: This classic tank by 987 is made with moisture-wicking fabric to keep you cool when you're at your most active. Each shirt comes with a bracer and a bandolier to create a bold and aggressive style.

sch_tophat_01.description: As part of their Dafne collection, Derion is proud to present the Jacopo tophat. Perfect for an elegant night on the town, this gossamer-lined top hat was commissioned in honor of the Port Renatus Metropolitan Opera House Quincentennial.

Item Type: Heavy Armor

Temp. Rating: -85 / 115 °C

Salvaged pieces of disused protective gear were welded together to make this intimidating armor set.

vpw_bouncer_gloves_01_01_01.description: The 2Tuf features an ultrasoft cloth lining paired with a durable lab-grown leather exterior for comfort and unrestricted mobility. Thanks to a simple design with reinforced stitching, the glove can survive a rough night on the streets and still be ready for elegant evening out.

987_jacket_01_01_01.description:
Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU

Women's sizes currently out of stock.

Carrying Capacity: 2K µSCU

Women's sizes currently out of stock.

987_hat_01_01_01.description: The Bantam hat from 987 offers a large bill and cushioned banding for all-day comfort. This version features a white front with an orange back and bill.

987_hat_01_01_badgerbad.description: The Bantam hat from 987 offers a large bill and cushioned banding for all-day comfort. This version features a Badger Bad logo on the front with a gray back and red bill.

987_hat_01_01_dmc.description: The Bantam hat from 987 offers a large bill and cushioned banding for all-day comfort. This version features a Denim Manufacture Corporation logo on the front with an dark slate back and bill.

987_hat_01_01_philsfillup.description: The Bantam hat from 987 offers a large bill and cushioned banding for all-day comfort. This version features a Phil's Fill-Up logo on the front with a red back and bill.

987_hat_01_01_storall.description: The Bantam hat from 987 offers a large bill and cushioned banding for all-day comfort. This version features a Stor*All logo on the front with an orange back and gray bill.

987_hat_01_01_taba.description: The Bantam hat from 987 offers a large bill and cushioned banding for all-day comfort. This version features a green front with a T.A.B.A Freightline logo paired with a dark gray back and bill.

987_hat_01_01_urw.description: The Bantam hat from 987 offers a large bill and cushioned banding for all-day comfort. This version features a United Resource Worker's logo on the front with a gray back and bill.

987_jacket_03_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU\n\nFashionable, fun and flashy, the Tempo is a quilt studded jacket featuring a unique metallic finish to make you stand out from the crowd. 987 balanced this bold design with sections of synthetic leather and complementary colors ringing the waistband and inner collar.

987_jacket_03_01_9tails01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU\n\nThis version of 987's Tempo jacket has been modified from its original form. Fashionable, fun and flashy, the Tempo is a quilt studded jacket featuring a unique metallic finish to make you stand out from the crowd. 987 balanced this bold design with sections of synthetic leather and complementary colors ringing the waistband and inner collar.

987_jacket_05_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU\n\nWhether you're coasting through outdoor adventures or cruising to exclusive afterparties, the Faction coat is sure to turn heads. Fusing sections of ultra-insulated brick quilting with 987's DuraBull ripstop reinforced fabric, you'll stay warm while still looking cool.

987_pants_01_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 0.5K µSCU\n\n987 redefines classic slacks with the Torreto. These mid-rise, straight cut pants incorporate a section of fabric studding along the side seam to provide a pop of personality.

987_pants_01_01_9tails01.description: Carrying Capacity: 0.5K µSCU\n\nThis version of 987's Torreto pants has been modified from its original form. 987 redefines classic slacks with the Torreto. These mid-rise, straight cut pants incorporate a section of fabric studding along the side seam to provide a pop of personality.

987_pants_03_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 0.5K µSCU\n\n987 delivers comfort, durability, and style with the Union pants. Designed with a special, next-gen blend of high-performance synthetic fabrics, these pants are enduringly fashionable in these modern times.

987_pants_03_01_9tails01.description: Carrying Capacity: 0.5K µSCU\n\nThis version of 987's Union pants has been modified from its original form. 987 delivers comfort, durability, and style with the Union pants. Designed with a special, next-gen blend of high-performance synthetic fabrics, these pants are enduringly fashionable in these modern times.

987_shirt_01_01_01.description: The battle against pirate captain Balthazar jumps from the arcade to this animated t-shirt. Special fabric scrolls graphics from 'Hyper Vanguard Force IV' to celebrate this arcade classic from Original System.

987_shirt_03_01_01.description: The Adrift mock neck sweater takes the idea of fashion as entertainment to the next level. This comfortable fiber blend material features a special vid-fabric depicting a dynamic space scene to ensure that people won't be able to keep their eyes off you.

987_shoes_01_01_01.description: From bustling backstreets to crowded clubs, the UrbEx boots will make your next step a bold one. The boots blend a stylish design with reinforced high ankle support and ultra durable outsoles.

987_shoes_01_01_20.description: The ThermoWeave boots receive a special dual-coat to achieve the same fire-rating as the rest of the suit. The boots also have reinforced high ankle support and ultra durable, anti-slip outsoles.\n\nWorn by employees who require an extra level of protection in their field, the ASD Edition showcases the reds and greens of the ASD branding.

alb_bandana_01_01_shared.description: Made from only the finest cotton, this bandana from Alejo Brothers features a double-sided print and sewn edges to guarantee durability.

alb_jacket_01_01_01.description:
Carrying Capacity: 2K µSCU

Alejo Brothers have seamlessly blended functionality and style with the Tuvic line of outerwear. These rugged jackets feature reinforced leather padding to offer additional protection and support while still maintaining a modern aesthetic.

Women's sizes currently out of stock.

alb_jacket_01_ruso.description:
Carrying Capacity: 2K µSCU

Proudly wear your support of the Rust Society with this custom version of Alejo Brothers' classic Tuvic Outerwear industrial jacket. The perfect companion for those long hauls and endless digs.

Women's sizes currently out of stock.

basl_combat_light_core_01_01_01.description:
Item Type: Light Armor 
Damage Reduction: 20%
Carrying Capacity: 4K µSCU
Backpack Compatibility: NA

The Advocacy Interceptor is lightweight yet ultra resilient armor that provides protection without sacrificing mobility. Mixing impact resistant fabrics with precision plating, the armor also comes with easily accessible pouches on the waist and adjustable straps to ensure an ideal fit. This system is extensively used by the Advocacy thanks to the armor's excellent comfort, quality, and protection.

basl_combat_light_helmet_01_01_01.description:
Item Type: Racing Helmet
Damage Reduction: 5%
Temp. Rating: -31 / 61 °C
Radiation Protection: 26000 REM
Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s

The unique open-faced design makes the Advocacy Interceptor helmet a lightweight and liberating option for operating in atmosphere. It features precisely layered plating to protect the head from a variety of combat and environmental hazards and an impact resistant, anti-glare visor over the eyes. Visor is AR crosshair compatible.

basl_undersuit_01_01_01.description:
Item Type: Racing Flight Suit
Damage Reduction: 5%
Temp. Rating: -30 / 60 °C
Radiation Protection: 15200 REM
Radiation Scrub Rate: 81 REM/s
G-Force Tolerance: +100%
Carrying Capacity: 8.0 µSCU

Featuring a deceptively simple design, the Advocacy Interceptor is jet black with reinforced grey protective padding on the arms and legs. Basilisk's renowned craftsmanship make this flight suit durable and supremely comfortable, leaving no mystery as to why it's widely used by the Advocacy.

cbd_hat_01_01_01.description: This military cadet hat from CBD blends lightweight fabric and leather for a striking design. Featuring a white skull offset on the front and "Death From Above" on the side.\n\nWomen's sizes currently out of stock.

cbd_hat_01_01_shared.description: This military cadet hat from CBD blends lightweight fabric and leather for a striking design.\n\nWomen's sizes currently out of stock.

cbd_hat_02_01_shared.description: Metal bullet studs are embedded into the front of this military cadet hat from CBD, which also features RAGE written across the side. \n\nWomen's sizes currently out of stock.

cbd_jacket_01_01_shared.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU\n\nExpress your attitude with this ultramodern crash jacket from CBD. An asymmetrical front zipper, arm and shoulder straps help provide additional style for this unique piece.

cbd_pants_01_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 2K µSCU\n\nGet down and dirty with CBD's Skellig-wear. These utility pants feature durable vinyl-composite material with reinforced ridged kneepads.

cbd_shirt_01_01_01.description: Most may believe in Admiral Bishop, but you're not most people. You prefer to address him as Admiral Bullsh*t, so flaunt your intellectual independence with this shirt from CBD.\n\nWomen's sizes currently out of stock.

cbd_shirt_01_02_01.description: CBD's proud to introduce this graphic tee featuring the album artwork from The Leedos' classic debut album Never Silent.\n\nWomen's sizes currently out of stock.

cbd_shirt_01_03_01.description: Proclaim your passion for poli-rock rebels The Leedos with this lightweight and supremely soft shirt from CBD, featuring artwork from their United Empire of Extinction tour.\n\nWomen's sizes currently out of stock.

cbd_shirt_01_04_01.description: Be crass and comfortable with this swearing skull shirt from CBD made from 100% ring-spun cotton.\n\nWomen's sizes currently out of stock.

cbd_shirt_02_01_01.description: This thrash-tacular tee from CBD rocks Gutterwash's infamous half-human, half-Vanduul logo, and also features leather straps sewn into the shoulder slope seam.\n\nWomen's sizes currently out of stock.

cbd_shirt_02_02_01.description: Be an officially authorized party monster in this Gutterwash graphic tee from CBD with double-stitched hem and sleeves to help it survive those wild nights. \n\nWomen's sizes currently out of stock.

cbd_shirt_02_03_01.description: Announce your apathy in this Gutterwash tee. Or don't. Like it'll really make a difference either way. CBD out.\n\nWomen's sizes currently out of stock.

cbd_shirt_02_04_01.description: This shirt from CBD features an athletic cut and an eye-catching dripping skull graphic.\n\nWomen's sizes currently out of stock.

cbd_trenchcoat_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 2K µSCU\n\nA modern update of CBD's classic duster, this full-length coat features two-tone coloring and inlaid accents to make a bold statement whatever environment you're in.

Originally developed to pair perfectly with CDS's FBL-8a light armor, it remains compatible with other armor sets.

Grade: B

Few things can push your ship to its limits like racing. Going faster and harder generates a lot of excess heat that can take a toll on your system if not properly managed. The ZeroRush cooler from ACOM has what it takes to get you across the finish line.

cool_aegs_s01_glacier.description:
Item Type: Cooler
Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics
Size: 1
Grade: A
Class: Military

Your weapons, your shields, your thrusters. All vital during combat, all generating heat. Enter the Glacier cooler from Aegis Dynamics. A best-in-class heat management system designed to keep you cool as the pressure mounts.

cool_aegs_s01_tundra.description:
Item Type: Cooler
Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics
Size: 1
Grade: D
Class: Military

Constructed by Aegis with military performance in mind, the Tundra’s reliable performance has made it a standard cooler of the UEE Navy.

cool_aegs_s02_avalanche.description:
Item Type: Cooler
Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics
Size: 2
Grade: A
Class: Military

Showcasing the best of mil-spec cooler technology, the Aegis Avalanche thermal management unit has been built from the ground up to endure the demanding needs of the battlefield.

cool_aegs_s02_boreal.description:
Item Type: Cooler
Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics
Size: 2
Grade: D
Class: Military

Designed to disperse the heat of battle, Aegis Dynamics’ Boreal cooler is a military standard with the capacity to survive stressful situations.

cool_aegs_s02_permafrost.description:
Item Type: Cooler
Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics
Size: 2
Grade: B
Class: Military

Designed by Aegis to military standards, the Permafrost cooler has proven itself time and again to be more than capable of handling heat processing even while under the strains of combat.

cool_aegs_s03_tempest.description:
Item Type: Cooler
Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics
Size: 3
Grade: B
Class: Military

On the frontlines, you want to know that your ship is going to perform as expected when you need it most. The mil-spec Tempest cooler sees to it that you can operate within safe thermal ratings for longer thanks to advanced manufacturing by Aegis.

cool_jspn_s00_cryostarsl.description:
Item Type: Cooler
Manufacturer: J-Span
Size: 0
Grade: B
Class: Civilian

J-Span’s done it again. The Cryo-Star SL incorporates the same consumer award winning performance and durability you’ve come to expect from a Cryo-Star, but now available for smaller vehicles.

cool_jspn_s01_cryostar.description:
Item Type: Cooler
Manufacturer: J-Span
Size: 1
Grade: B
Class: Civilian

J-Span’s consumer-grade Cryo-Star cooler has become a common sight across the Empire thanks to its reliable heat absorption that won’t strain your ship’s power-plant.

cool_jspn_s02_cryostarex.description:
Item Type: Cooler
Manufacturer: J-Span
Size: 2
Grade: B
Class: Civilian

With its EX line, J-Span has brought the same reliable heat absorption of their popular Cryo-Star cooler to pilots looking to outfit larger ships.

cool_jspn_s03_cryostarxl.description:
Item Type: Cooler
Manufacturer: J-Span
Size: 3
Grade: B
Class: Civilian

With its well-crafted design and dependable performance, the Cryo-Star XL cooler proves from the moment you use it that no one understands heat management better than J-Span.

cool_just_s01_ecoflow.description:
Item Type: Cooler
Manufacturer: Juno Starwerk
Size: 1
Grade: B
Class: Industrial

A standard for centuries, Juno Starwerk’s industrial Eco-Flow cooler is a favorite of haulers for being easy to maintain even when carrying the heaviest cargo loads.

cool_just_s01_ultraflow.description:
Item Type: Cooler
Manufacturer: Juno Starwerk
Size: 1
Grade: A
Class: Industrial

Juno Starwerk has crafted the Ultra-Flow to not only withstand the demanding cooling needs of your ship’s systems as it works, but to do it longer and better than other coolers in its class.

cool_just_s02_snowfall.description:
Item Type: Cooler
Manufacturer: Juno Starwerk
Size: 2
Grade: B
Class: Industrial

Few things can be as damaging to your ship over time as excess heat build up. The Juno Starwerk Snowfall cooler helps ensure that your ship stays the right temperature for longer, which means that you can keep flying for longer.

cool_just_s03_iceflush.description:
Item Type: Cooler
Manufacturer: Juno Starwerk
Size: 3
Grade: B
Class: Industrial

The Juno Starwerk Ice-Flush cooler is built to withstand the heat demands and thermal strains that many industrial ships deal with as part of their average workday.

cool_lplt_s01_flashfreeze.description:
Item Type: Cooler
Manufacturer: Lightning Power Ltd.
Size: 1
Grade: B
Class: Civilian

With the FlashFreeze, Lightning Power makes sure that no matter how hot things get, you can rely on its proven cooling technology to keep you flying.

cool_lplt_s02_fullfrost.description:
Item Type: Cooler
Manufacturer: Lightning Power Ltd.
Size: 2
Grade: B
Class: Civilian

Proper thermal management and heat distribution is a concern for any pilot who cares about the longevity and performance of their ship. Now you can fly easy knowing you have the advanced FullFrost cooler by Lightning Power aboard.

cool_lplt_s02_whiteout.description:
Item Type: Cooler
Manufacturer: Lightning Power Ltd.
Size: 2
Grade: D
Class: Civilian

Your ship faces a lot of extreme conditions while flying. From the coldness of space to the burning heat of a desert planet, the last thing you want to worry about is if your cooler can keep up. The entry-level WhiteOut from Lightning Power provides thermal management that can help make sure you get where you’re going.

cool_lplt_s03_frostbite.description:
Item Type: Cooler
Manufacturer: Lightning Power Ltd.
Size: 3
Grade: B
Class: Civilian

Keep your ship running smoothly with the Lightning Power FrostBite handling your thermal management needs. This consumer-grade cooler can process extra-heat and help maintain optimal running temperatures for all your components.

cool_tydt_s01_snowblind.description:
Item Type: Cooler
Manufacturer: Tyler Design & Tech
Size: 1
Grade: A
Class: Stealth

An IR signature that is running hot is a surefire way to alert the entire sector to your whereabouts and can often potentially prove to be dangerous. With the Tyler Design & Tech Snowblind cooling system onboard you can significantly reduce your heat emissions while keeping your ship running within optimal thermal conditions.

cool_vncl_s01_cold.description:
Item Type: Cooler
Manufacturer: Vanduul
Size: 1
Grade: N/A
Class: Military

A small cooler found aboard Vanduul crafts and code-named “Cold” by the military, its thermo-tolerances have been tuned to meet the aggressive needs of Vanduul pilots.

cool_wcpr_s00_kelvid.description:

Manufacturer: Wen/Cassel Propulsion
Size: 0
Grade: B

cool_wcpr_s01_gelid.description:

Manufacturer: Wen/Cassel Propulsion
Size: 1
Grade: A
Class: Civilian

cool_wcpr_s02_graupel.description:

Manufacturer: Wen/Cassel Propulsion
Size: 2
Grade: C
Class: Civilian

Manufacturer: Wen/Cassel Propulsion
Size: 2
Grade: B
Class: Civilian

Wen/Cassel has worked long and hard to develop quality coolers like the latest edition Taiga, which can process and manage excess heat while consistently maintaining the high standards that they have become known for.

ctl_hat_01_01_shared.description: A classic structured baseball cap with an accent stripe to add a pop of color. City Lights' proprietary COOL-WEV technology keeps your head cool and dry in any environment.\n\nWomen's sizes currently out of stock.

ctl_jacket_01_01_shared.description:
Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU

A modern take on the iconic crash jacket, the Sturgis from City Lights stands out thanks to its asymmetrical main zipper and plethora of pockets, but its timeless design will keep you in style for years. 

Women's sizes currently out of stock.

ctl_jacket_02_01_shared.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU\n\nA classic racer jacket elevated by detailed seam work, a collar strap and decorative, eye-catching flourishes on the chest and arms. City Lights has once again redefined fashion and comfort.

ctl_jacket_03_01_shared.description:
Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU

This simple knit jacket from City Lights features a classic cut and chic microseam technology to create a thoroughly modern addition to any wardrobe. It also features a stand collar to help keep you warm.

Women's sizes currently out of stock.

ctl_pants_01_01_shared.description:
Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU

These straight-leg pants from City Lights are essential for everyday work and play. Both the front and back pockets feature metallic button accents to provide that perfect amount of flair.

Women's sizes currently out of stock.

ctl_pants_02_01_shared.description:
Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU

Step up the style with these bold pants from City Lights. Six zipper pockets and a slanted fly will bring a bit of attitude to your wardrobe.

Women's sizes currently out of stock.

ctl_shirt_03_01_shared.description: This stylish t-shirt from City Lights is made from a lighter fabric that's perfect for warmer climates.

ctl_shirt_06_01_shared.description: Enhance your basic t-shirt game with this stylish short sleeve t-shirt from City Lights, which features a dynamic, asymmetrical line across the front.\n\nWomen's sizes currently out of stock.

carryable_2h_cy_collectormaterial_001.description: This is a test for new metamaterial with special design by Wikelo. It will be light and strong but maybe not! Good to test.

carryable_2h_sq_collectormaterial_002.description: This a new metamaterial test with design by Wikelo. I think one will this help make things go faster. Last two tests not so good, but maybe this one works.

compboard_paf.description: An alignment blade essential to the function of mining lasers. Terminals at Platform Alignment Facilities require three of these blades to make the precise calculations needed to orientate the dish before the Orbital Laser Platform can fire.

countermeasure_decoy.description: These countermeasures are designed to act like compact ship emulators. These specialty rounds emit high concentrations of EM and phosphorous heat to attract missile guidance systems or pilots flying by radar/scans.

countermeasure_smokescreen.description: This area effect countermeasure consists of a grapeshot canister that when launched explodes and scatters hundreds of smaller explosions that scatter and detonate, creating a wide dispersal volume of electrically charged metal and glass particles that can disrupt electromagnetic, infrared, and cross-section scanners. Ships and missiles will lose targeting on any ships that are inside of or obscured by the field.

crus_whale_suit_01_01_01.description: A large, soft plush costume of Crusader's beloved mascot Finley the Stormwal. Made exclusively for Crusader Industries to greet and welcome visitors to the floating city of Orison.

dmc_gloves_02_01_01.description: Designed to provide warmth to your hands while still allowing you to precisely manipulate things, the Mercury gloves from DMC are perfect for outdoor activities or colder work environments.

dmc_jacket_01_01_01.description:
Temp. Rating: -20 / 10 °C
Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU

These insulated, water-resistant jackets are perfect for any jobsite where temperature can be a factor. The Mountaintop from DMC features secure pockets and is made with a vinyl-weave exterior, guaranteeing that rough environments won't compromise your warmth.

Women's sizes currently out of stock.

dmc_jacket_02_01_shared.description:
Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU

Look as good as you feel with this trendy jacket from DMC. The Selby also features a soft inner lining to provide extra comfort and insulation.

Women's sizes currently out of stock.

dmc_jacket_03_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 3K µSCU\n\nThis insulation outdoor jacket from DMC is lined with reinforced padding to provide durable comfort for everyday wear.

dmc_jacket_04_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 2K µSCU\n\nCelebrate launch week in iconic style with this commemorative flight jacket featuring a Navy patch on the front and a large Invictus patch on the back. This synthetic leather jacket comes with two front pockets and ribbed waistband and cuffs that guarantee a good fit.

dmc_jacket_13_02_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 2K µSCU\n\nSuper style! Supreme comfort! The Wikelo Emporium jacket is made with premium synthetic leather for a resilient and fashionable exterior, and an ultra-soft lining that enwraps the Human body like friend. Expect nothing less than the absolute best when Wikelo put their name on it.

dmc_pants_01_01_01.description:
Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU

DMC's Foundation line is just that; the foundation for your work wear. Featuring a simple, elegant cut with easy-access pockets, the Foundation is both professional and functional.

Women's sizes currently out of stock.

dmc_pants_02_01_shared.description:
Carrying Capacity: 2K µSCU

Flaunt your rugged yet refined sensibility with these cargo pants from DMC. With grey accents and contrast stripes down each side, Astleys are durable, comfortable, and always on point. 

Women's sizes currently out of stock.

dmc_pants_03_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 0.5K µSCU\n\nDMC's Frontier collection has been a staple of frontier living for centuries. These heavy denim workpants have double-stitched reinforcement and stainguard technology, making them dependable pants for any environment day in and day out.

dmc_gloves_01.description: DMC's Gauntlet gloves feel like a hard day's work. Built with resilient GranTec composite weaves, these Gauntlets live up to their name, providing maximum protection against environments and impacts so you can work another day.

dmc_gloves_02_01_centurion.description: Keep your hands warm and fingers nimble with Mercury gloves from DMC. Ideal for outdoor activities or colder work environments, the special Voyager edition comes in red with gold trim.

dead_tree.description: Contrary to its ominous name, the Revenant is actually a variety of the Altrucia tree, an indigenous plant of Terra III known for its thick and colorful leaves. Geoengineers introduced fields of Altrucias to Hyperion in an effort to break up the dust storms. Although the project failed, the Altrucia trees adapted to the perpetual wind patterns, shedding its leaves and thickening the wood in the trunk. Botanists initially believed that the Altrucias had died, but on closer inspection, discovered that they were quite alive and thus, the name was born.

eld_jacket_01_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU\n\nSimple, comfortable and understated. While most fashion designers avoid these terms, Escar Limited understands that sometimes you just want something that feels right. Based on the classic design from Centauri II, the Archibald is a simple, comfortable and understated light jacket made from a polyweave that doesn't restrict airflow.

eld_jacket_02_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU\n\nStay stylishly protected from the elements with the Geoffrey. Escar Limited's casual jacket features a durable water-repellent finish with a slick brushed look, alongside sleeves featuring an articulated elbow.

eld_pants_01_01_shared.description:
Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU

Embody the Escar aesthetic of casual comfort with these classic pants. Ideal for lounging. Ideal for errands. Ideal for you.

Women's sizes currently out of stock.

eld_pants_01_02_shared.description:
Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU

Spice up your wardrobe with a pair of 99 pants from Escar Limited. The juxtaposition of colors, each made from a different fabric, form a striking design for when you want to make a statement.

Women's sizes currently out of stock.

eld_pants_02_01_shared.description:
Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU

88s are the ultimate leisure attire from Escar Limited. From the striking color to the tailored fit, they are the perfect complement for laid back days and festive nights.

Women's sizes currently out of stock.

eld_pants_03_01_01.description:
Carrying Capacity: 0.5K µSCU

Keep it easy with EQ athletic pants from Escar Limited. Made with a sweat-wicking microweave and a subtle pleated design, the EQ are a comfortable and stylish choice for those days when you're looking to keep it cool.

Women's sizes currently out of stock.

eld_pants_04_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU\n\nKeep it CS-L with these soft, fleece-lined athletic pants from Escar Limited. These loose, relaxed pants provide supreme comfort whether on the move or unwinding.

eld_pants_05_01_01.description:
Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU

With the help of iconic designer Ubaid, Escar Limited created these crop pants for the fashion forward who don't want to be overly flashy. The 55-GR features a subtle tartan pattern and baggy cuffs.   

Women's sizes currently out of stock.

eld_shirt_01_01_01.description: Be bold. Be you. Escar LImited's Hannu line of ultra-cas shirts features a fading asymmetrical cut and patchweave material that feels both rustic and thoroughly modern.\n\nWomen's sizes currently out of stock.

eld_shirt_02_01_01.description: Distressed to impress, the Shackleton line provides comfort with an edge. Escar Limited abrades the shirt fabric to give it a repurposed charm and unique look that fits in at home or on the streets.

eld_shirt_03_01_01.description: A partial zip pullover shirt with mesh arm accents and a button collar. Escar Limited's Balboa line delivers cutting edge style suitable for any system or situation. \n\nWomen's sizes currently out of stock.

eld_shirt_04_assistance_dec.description: In space, no one can hear your scream. That's why they created ECN alerts. Commemorate the kindness of strangers with the Rescue Required shirt, featuring an astronaut fleeing from danger.

eld_shirt_04_ejection_dec.description: Commiserate with other Captains whose chair won't go anywhere. The Ejection Rejection shirt features a smoldering Cutlass while wondering why anyone would ever need an ejection seat.

eld_shirt_04_grimhex_dec.description: Scoundrels, scalawags, and scum gather at Grim HEX, so show that you're part of such illustrious company with the Lost Wallet shirt made from comfortable, synthetic cotton.

eld_shirt_04_lorville_dec.description: Lorville, come for the low wages and leave with a lethal respiratory condition. The Lorville Blues shirt celebrates the iconic, corporate-owned landing zone best seen with a plastic bag over your head.

eld_shirt_04_olisar_dec.description: The Stuck at Olisar shirt recreates the infamous ASOP terminal screen frequently seen at Port Olisar. Anyone who's visited this bustling transportation hub can relate to the gnawing fear of seeing this screen appear as a result of Olisar officials clearing abandoned, crashed, or improperly parked spacecraft from their landing pads.

eld_shirt_04_required_dec.description: This short sleeve shirt features the iconic warning sign found near airlocks across the universe. Wear the Vacuums Kill shirt to remind everyone of the horrors that happens when one removes their helmet in the vacuum of space.

eld_shirt_10_01_01.description: When a civilian version of the long-admired Idris-M frigate debuted in 2875, it caught the imagination of countless pilots and quickly became one of Aegis' most popular capital ships. Celebrate 80 years of the Idris-P with this limited-edition T-Shirt, featuring a schematic-style image of the capital ship on the front and the logo of Aegis Dynamics on the back.

eld_jacket_03_01_shared.description: Carrying Capacity: 2K µSCU\n\nWeather the cold with this waterproof and insulated jacket from Escar Limited. Featuring a stylish design and unique dual-layer collar, the Parvat will keep you warm when you need it most.

eld_shirt_04_01_cubby_blast.description: Show your support for local and independently owned businesses with this Cubby Blast t-shirt. From its infectious holo-jingle promising "racks of rifles, stacks of shotguns, piles of pistols" to Clor Vee, the eccentric owner with a thick Cathcart accent, Cubby Blast remains one of Area18's most unique shops, and a refreshing change of pace from the corporate-owned chain stores that dominant the Empire.\n

eld_shirt_04_01_big_bennys.description: This Big Benny's shirt embodies the joy of dining on their delicious kacho with an animated image that rotates between two versions of the brand's iconic logo. Wearing it is bound to remind everyone to grab and eat this tasty treat.

eld_shirt_04_01_carrack.description: Express your passion for the unknown with this Carrack t-shirt. Celebrate the popular and iconic exploration ship with this comfortable black t-shirt that creatively combines an overhead view of the Carrack with the Anvil logo on the front and the ship's name on the back.

eld_shirt_04_01_cutlass.description: Don't judge a ship by its reputation. Show that pilots of all ilk love the Cutlass line of ships because of their versatility, affordability, and general bad-assery. The front of this black t-shirt features the iconic ship swooping before of the Drake logo and has the ship's name proudly displayed on the back.

eld_shirt_04_01_dumpers_depo.description: Be sure to keep this shirt off the scrap heap. Made from ring-spun cotton for an ultra-comfortable fit, this Dumper's Depot shirt features an animated spinning gear in the logo that's bound to get people's attention.

eld_shirt_04_01_eclipse.description: An Eclipse silhouetted against a planet is a rare sight, considering that this high-tech, stealth bomber is notorious for striking targets before it's even spotted. After years of military service, Aegis Dynamics, whose logo appears the back of the t-shirt, brought the ship to the civilian market in 2947 to rave review and stellar sales.

eld_shirt_04_01_pips.description: Comfort meets refreshing style with this Pips graphic t-shirt, which features the popular energy drink's logo on the front and "Power Up" on the back.

eld_shirt_04_01_torpedo_burrito.description: Show your affinity for the meal guaranteed to destroy your hunger. This ultra-soft natural fiber shirt features the Torpedo Burrito logo on the front and their very appropriate catch phrase "Unleash A Payload of Flavor" on the back.

eld_shirt_04_01_valkyrie.description: Built for the battlefield, the Valkyrie bravely dives into the kind of danger that other ships avoid. Its ability to deploy ground troops and vehicles swiftly has made it a military favorite for decades. Now popular in the civilian market, this black t-shirt does the Valkyrie justice with a dynamic design across the front and the ship's name on the back.

evl_jacket_01_01_shared.description:
Carrying Capacity: 5K µSCU

The Manaslu from EvaLight's asymmetrical design is only one of its unique attributes. Made from a patented blend of fabrics, this jacket's surprisingly lightweight insulation will keep you warm in the coldest corners of the universe. 

Women's sizes currently out of stock.

evl_jacket_01_01_ruso.description:
Carrying Capacity: 5K µSCU

The Rust Society edition adds eye-catching colors to this jacket's unique asymmetrical design. Made from a patented blend of fabrics, the Manaslu's surprisingly lightweight insulation will keep you warm in the coldest corners of the universe.

Women's sizes currently out of stock.

evl_glasses_01.description: Inspired by the infamous Nexus-based outlaw group featured in the Star Marine game mode Theaters of War (Working Title), this intimidating and ostentatious limited-run eyewear is made with impact resistant red lens set in an intricately designed metal frame with gold plating.

fio_glasses_01.description: The Sarrab are stylish half-rim glasses that are so light you'll forget you're wearing them. Ideal for everyday use, these glasses feature clear polycarbonate temple arms that complement the lens without demanding too much attention.

fio_glasses_02.description: Fashion and function merge with the Ectio glasses from Fiore. Adjustable temple arms provide the perfect fit to sit snugly in the ear, while crystal-tempered lenses guarantee a clear view under almost any atmospheric condition.

flair_coin_sq42_fw25.description: This collectible coin features the UEE logo emblazoned on one face and the Invictus Launch Week logo on the reverse.

grin_refinery_apron_01_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU\n\nThe ThermoWeave coat provides complete upper body fire and heat defense. It features a high collar and additional frontside protection thanks to a lengthy apron made of aluminized fabric that reflects radiant heat.

grin_refinery_backpack_01_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 33.8K µSCU\n\nThe ThermoWeave breathing apparatus integrates with the hood to ensure a constant flow of breathable oxygen regardless of air quality conditions.

grin_refinery_gloves_01_01_01.description: The ThermoWeave gloves were designed with a special multilayer weave and extra insulated padding on the palm and fingers for additional protection when touching hot objects.

grin_refinery_gloves_02_01_01.description: The ThermoWeave gloves were designed with a special multilayer weave and extra insulated padding on the palm and fingers for additional protection when touching hot objects.\n\nWorn by employees who require an extra level of protection in their field, the ASD Edition showcases the reds and greens of the ASD branding.

grin_refinery_helmet_01_01_01.description: The ThermoWeave hood integrates a heat and impact resistant hard hat with a neck covering hood that includes a vapor barrier to keep moisture build-up to a minimum. A large faceplate provides a wide field of view and the built-in respirator features a state-of-the-art filter to help you breathe easy.

grin_refinery_helmet_02_01_01.description: The ThermoWeave hood integrates a heat and impact resistant hard hat with a neck covering hood that includes a vapor barrier to keep moisture build-up to a minimum. A large faceplate provides a wide field of view and the built-in respirator features a state-of-the-art filter to help you breathe easy.\n\nWorn by employees who require an extra level of protection in their field, the ASD Edition showcases the reds and greens of the ASD branding.

grin_refinery_jacket_02_01_01.description:
Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU

The ThermoWeave coat provides complete upper body fire and heat defense. It features a high collar and additional frontside protection thanks to a lengthy apron made of aluminized fabric that reflects radiant heat.

Worn by employees who require an extra level of protection in their field, the ASD Edition showcases the reds and greens of the ASD branding.

grin_refinery_pants_01_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 2K µSCU\n\nThe ThermoWeave pants have a large, easy-access pocket on each leg and feature a special fire-resistant synthetic moisture-wicking lining that makes them comfortable to wear for an entire shift.

grin_refinery_pants_02_01_01.description:
Carrying Capacity: 2K µSCU

The ThermoWeave pants have a large, easy-access pocket on each leg and feature a special fire-resistant synthetic moisture-wicking lining that makes them comfortable to wear for an entire shift.

Worn by employees who require an extra level of protection in their field, the ASD Edition showcases the reds and greens of the ASD branding.

grin_utility_medium_arms_01.description:
Item Type: Medium Armor
Damage Reduction: 30%
Temp. Rating: -61 / 91 °C
Radiation Protection: 26400 REM
Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s
 
Originally designed for miners, the Aril armor includes a fully enclosed helmet and high collar providing additional support and protection for the neck and back of the head. An integrated tool belt and attachable backpack can accommodate a variety of tools and supplies to keep your hands free. The Aril armor is available in a variety of vibrant colors to fit your personal taste and for easy identification on the jobsite.

grin_utility_medium_arms_02.description:
Item Type: Medium Armor
Damage Reduction: 30%
Temp. Rating: -61 / 91 °C
Radiation Protection: 26400 REM
Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s

Made for miners but ready for any adventure, Greycat Industrial's Strata armor provides premium protection and convenient features. Each piece features an angular and precise design to deliver coverage where it's most needed most. A toolbelt with convenient pouches and a reinforced backpack offers plenty of storage. The award-winning helmet design has been copied by other manufacturers, but the original still reigns supreme with its high quality materials and next-gen air filtration system that enables clean breathing whether in a deep mine or hostile atmospheres.

grin_utility_medium_backpack_02_06_12.description:
Item Type: Medium Backpack
Carrying Capacity: 127.5K µSCU
Core Compatibility: Medium & Heavy

Made for miners but ready for any adventure, Greycat Industrial's Strata armor provides premium protection and convenient features. Each piece features an angular and precise design to deliver coverage where it's most needed most. A toolbelt with convenient pouches and a reinforced backpack offers plenty of storage. The award-winning helmet design has been copied by other manufacturers, but the original still reigns supreme with its high quality materials and next-gen air filtration system that enables clean breathing whether in a deep mine or hostile atmospheres. The microTech Black variant was made specifically for the company.

grin_utility_medium_core_01.description:
Item Type: Medium Armor
Damage Reduction: 30%
Temp. Rating: -61 / 91 °C
Radiation Protection: 26400 REM
Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s
Carrying Capacity: 6.4 µSCU
Backpacks: Medium, Light
 
Originally designed for miners, the Aril armor includes a fully enclosed helmet and high collar providing additional support and protection for the neck and back of the head. An integrated tool belt and attachable backpack can accommodate a variety of tools and supplies to keep your hands free. The Aril armor is available in a variety of vibrant colors to fit your personal taste and for easy identification on the jobsite.

gsb_boots_01_01_01.description: Grindstone's Wanderer line is an all-purpose boot designed to take any punishment you throw at it.

gsb_shoes_01_01_01.description: This steel-toe workboot from Grindstone features SureFire grip technology, giving you firm traction even on slip, oil and abrasion surfaces.

gsb_boots_01_01_imperator.description: Grindstone's Wanderer line is an all-purpose boot designed to take any punishment you throw at it. The rare Pathfinder edition is purple with silver highlights, discreetly bringing style to the jobsite.

gsb_boots_04_01_centurion.description: Who says work boots can't be comfortable? Grindstone's Landlite boots are built with a breathable synth-leather material to keep your feet dry, a contoured, memory footbed, and a slip-resistant outsole. The exclusive Voyager edition comes in black with red soles to provide a pop of color.

gys_helmet_01_01_imperator.description: The Ready-Up is a dependable, affordable softshell helmet alternative that provides a vacuum-ready seal to keep you breathing for longer. The Pathfinder edition uses special space-age plastic with a purple tint to produce a truly unique look.

glowing_vine.description: Similar to how the plant’s fictional namesake drowned in the ancient Earth play Hamlet, the bioluminescent Ophelia vine is submerged regularly by the tide that rises over the brackish sands it grows upon. The plants bright radiance is owing to the high quantity of luciferin it naturally absorbs from the heavy bacteria content found in its homemoon’s oceans.

hdh_hat_01_01_01.description: Habidash's simple and stylish head covering provides warmth, along with protection from the elements and prying eyes. The Rabum is made from a synthetic extra-long cotton to be light, absorbent, and easily laundered.

hrst_tiburon_s10_laserbeam.description:
Manufacturer: Hurston Dynamics
Type: Laser Beam
Size: 10

Developed in concert with the weapons specialists of Aegis to form part of the dedicated anti-capital ship loadout of the Tiburon, the Supremacy-10T combines surgical precision with devastating destructive power.

hwk_shoes_01_01_shared.description: Hawksworth's timeless Couloir low ankle, slip-on shoes are perfect for both casual and formal occasions. A forward facing seam and tapered toe give the shoe a subtle but uniquely elegant shape.\n\nWomen's sizes currently out of stock.

hwk_shoes_02_01_01.description: Hawksworth's De Leon take the classic cap toed Oxford design but incorporate a laceless slip-on design to create an exciting new addition to the world of formal footwear.

hat_monocle.description: As part of their Dafne collection, commissioned in honor of the Port Retanus Metropolitan Opera House Quincentennial, Derion is proud to present their Jacopo line of accessories. Perfect for an elegant night on the town, this diamond-laminate monocle with tungsten chain and gossamer-lined top hat feature the latest upgradable optiVis interface for unmatched comfort.

keycard_olp_access.description: A single-use keycard that grants Orbital Laser Platform employees access to storage areas.

keycard_olp_security.description: A single-use keycard used by Supervisors at Orbital Laser Platforms to access secured storage. To ensure restricted access to the area, this card loses its admin permissions after one use and cannot be reproduced.

keycard_paf_maintenance.description: A single-use keycard that grants Platform Alignment Facility employees access to maintenance doors.

keycard_paf_security.description: A single-use keycard that grants Platform Alignment Facility employees access to security doors.

keycard_olp_paf_bunkercard.description: This encoded keycard is required to activate an orbital mining laser. Security protocols require this single-use keycard be stored at orbital laser platforms until all pre-firing procedures have been met. The keycard must then be inserted into a terminal at a ground-based Laser Activation Bunker to activate the mining laser.

mym_shirt_02_01_01.description: MuyMuy's Atavi line of casual shirts are comfortable enough to wear at home, but stylish enough for a night out. They are made with EasyCare technology to maintain the colors during repeated washes.

mym_shirt_01_01_01.description: Live in comfort with MuyMuy's Davlos line of cotton-synthetic shirts. The durable, yet soft, fabric contains a patented SweatGuard technology that not only whisks away perspiration but helps prevent stains.

moss_head.description: Though simple looking, Conner’s Beard moss holds the notable distinction of being considered the first plant subspecies to have naturally evolved on a spacestation. Tied intrinsically with its unique place of birth, the bryophyte can only survive in the specific conditions that the aging station’s life support systems created. The sculpture featured in the Ecosphere is a replica of the gift shop souvenir the moss was originally discovered on by a waylaid botanist.

nrs_shoes_01_01_01.description: Fun and funky. That was the directive NorthStar designers were given when tasked with creating a new sneaker. The result? NorthStar's RipTop line of all-purpose footwear. Mission accomplished.

nrs_shoes_02_01_01.description: Take your next step in these versatile high-tops from NorthStar. The Hi&Tight's cut an intriguing profile by blending nylon and microweave fabric with a vulcanized rubber soul, padded collar, and cross foot fastening strap.

nvs_jacket_01_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU\n\nHonor the heroes that served in the Second Tevarin War by wearing a replica Navy uniform. Historically accurate down to every last stitch, period appropriate materials were used make these uniforms match military specifications of the era. The Service Jacket is primarily blue with a white and red stripe across the right shoulder and arm.

nvs_jacket_02_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU\n\nHonor the heroes that served in the Second Tevarin War by wearing a replica Navy uniform. Historically accurate down to every last stitch, period appropriate materials were used to make these uniforms match military specifications of the era. The red Dress Jacket features a sash adorned with metals and was worn for formal occasions and ceremonies.

nvs_jacket_02_01_10.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU\n\nHonor the heroes that served in the Second Tevarin War by wearing a replica Navy uniform. Historically accurate down to every last stitch, period appropriate materials were used to make these uniforms match military specifications of the era. The white Dress Jacket features a sash adorned with metals and was worn for formal occasions and ceremonies.

nvs_pants_01_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 0.5K µSCU\n\nHonor the heroes that served in the Second Tevarin War by wearing a replica Navy uniform. Historically accurate down to every last stitch, period appropriate materials were used to make these uniforms match military specifications of the era. The Service Trousers are blue with red piping and worn with the matching jacket.

nvs_pants_01_01_10.description: Carrying Capacity: 0.5K µSCU\n\nHonor the heroes that served in the Second Tevarin War by wearing a replica Navy uniform. Historically accurate down to every last stitch, period appropriate materials were used to make these uniforms match military specifications of the era. The white Dress Trousers were worn with the matching jacket for formal occasions and ceremonies.

nvs_pants_01_01_13.description: Carrying Capacity: 0.5K µSCU\n\nHonor the heroes that served in the Second Tevarin War by wearing a replica Navy uniform. Historically accurate down to every last stitch, period appropriate materials were used to make these uniforms match military specifications of the era. The red Dress Trousers were worn with the matching jacket for formal occasions and ceremonies.

ops_pants_01_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU\n\nFrom modern work environments to casual gatherings, OpalSky's Devereaux slacks have been a consistent member of everyday wardrobe.

ops_shirt_01_01_01.description: OpalSky's Thorby features a classic asymmetrical design and high collar that evokes timeless style and elegance.

outlaw_heavy_helmet.description:
Item Type: Heavy Armor
Damage Reduction: 40%
Temp. Rating: -80 / 105 °C
Radiation Protection: 52800 REM
Radiation Scrub Rate: 251.1 REM/s


Seems like common knowledge to place the most protection on the most vital parts, right? Kastak Arms' Slugger helmet doublesdown on that approach. This heavy combat helmet features multiple layers of composite armor types providing maximum protection against everything from environments to weapon fire. Although field of view may be slightly compromised, the Slugger will keep you alive long enough to see your enemy.

outlaw_light_helmet.description:
Item Type: Light Armor
Damage Reduction: 20%
Temp. Rating: -35 / 65 °C
Radiation Protection: 26000 REM
Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s

Kastak Arm's Sparrer helmet features a single-sheet laminate covering with reinforced understructure to protect against impact and penetration, but is mostly known for its projected HUD elements, which, while providing valuable tactical data, also provides an intimidating sight for would-be enemies.

outlaw_medium_helmet.description:
Item Type: Medium Armor
Damage Reduction: 30%
Temp. Rating: -61 / 91 °C
Radiation Protection: 26400 REM
Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s

True to its name, the Brawler is built to back you up in a fight. The helmet is an enclosed, full-cover shell made from molded titanium alloy designed to strike an imposing presence while offering maximum protection from incoming fire.

powr_acom_s01_lumacore.description:
Item Type: Power Plant
Manufacturer: ACOM
Size: 1
Grade: A
Class: Competition

Among small power plants, ACOM’s LumaCore consistently ranks among the best for its power rate, cool rate, and high overheat temperature. That’s why if you value your ship’s performance over anything else, this competition-grade component is perfect for you.

powr_acom_s01_starheart.description:
Item Type: Power Plant
Manufacturer: ACOM
Size: 1
Grade: B
Class: Competition

Four generations of racing knowledge and know-how are behind ACOM’s StarHeart power plant. Known for its rapid power distribution, the StarHeart has become a favorite among speedsters.

powr_acom_s01_sunflare.description:
Item Type: Power Plant
Manufacturer: ACOM
Size: 1
Grade: C
Class: Competition

Harness the power of a star with this high performance power plant from ACOM. Ideal for racers and those who seek speed.

powr_acom_s02_solarflare.description:
Item Type: Power Plant
Manufacturer: ACOM
Size: 2
Grade: C
Class: Competition

The ACOM team took their years of experience in the racing world and applied it to their component designs. That focus has helped make the SolarFlare a popular power plant among pilots that want to prioritize performance.

powr_aegs_s01_charger.description:
Item Type: Power Plant
Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics
Size: 1
Grade: D
Class: Military

The Aegis Charger has powered military fighters for generations. Tried and tested in the most demanding of situations, the Charger can handle sudden or sustained power draws with ease.

powr_aegs_s01_fierellcascade.description:
Item Type: Power Plant
Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics
Size: 1
Grade: B
Class: Military

Rely on Aegis’ expertise to power your ship. The Fierell Cascade is a military-grade power plant that prioritizes performance over everything else.

powr_aegs_s01_quadracell.description:
Item Type: Power Plant
Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics
Size: 1
Grade: A
Class: Military

Few military-grade power plants get better than the Aegis QuadraCell. It wasn’t just built to survive the heat of battle, it was built to thrive in it.

powr_aegs_s01_regulus.description:
Item Type: Power Plant
Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics
Size: 1
Grade: C
Class: Military

The Regulus is the power plant you can count on when everyone is counting on you. Made to exceed exacting military standards, Aegis’ design team has made sure that you have the extra power you need, when you need it most.

powr_aegs_s02_bolide.description:
Item Type: Power Plant
Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics
Size: 2
Grade: B
Class: Military

The Bolide power plant from Aegis has logged innumerable hours of flight experience and is frequently used by the UEE Navy and security forces across the Empire.

powr_aegs_s02_vortex.description:
Item Type: Power Plant
Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics
Size: 2
Grade: D
Class: Military

Turn the tide of battle with the Aegis Vortex. Counted on by the UEE Navy, this power plant can be found on ships defending every corner of the universe.

powr_aegs_s03_centurion.description:
Item Type: Power Plant
Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics
Size: 3
Grade: C
Class: Military

The Centurion stands ready to power your ship. This large power plant from Aegis Dynamics has been in service for centuries and has consistently proven to supply solid performance and durability.

powr_aegs_s03_fulgur.description:
Item Type: Power Plant
Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics
Size: 3
Grade: B
Class: Military

Tried and tested by the UEE Navy on the Vanduul front, the Fulgur large power plant from Aegis Dynamics is now available for all to put to use protecting what’s important.

powr_amrs_s01_dynaflux.description:
Item Type: Power Plant
Manufacturer: Amon & Reese Co.
Size: 1
Grade: B
Class: Military

The DynaFlux was one of the first components A&R Co. built when they expanded their product line to more than energy weapons. Their years of experience manufacturing military-grade equipment went a long way to making the DynaFlux power plant a standout right from the beginning.

powr_amrs_s01_hypergen.description:
Item Type: Power Plant
Manufacturer: Amon & Reese Co.
Size: 1
Grade: D
Class: Military

The HyperGen power plant is popular among both civilians and the military for its high quality. As a bonus, the manufacture, Amon & Reese, is famous for its stellar customer service.

powr_amrs_s01_overdrive.description:
Item Type: Power Plant
Manufacturer: Amon & Reese Co.
Size: 1
Grade: C
Class: Military

Amon & Reese knows from years of experience just how hard the military can push their ships. Their OverDrive power plant was designed from the ground up to not only handle those tough conditions with less overheating, but to provide the same dependability and power to civilians as well.

powr_amrs_s02_exogen.description:
Item Type: Power Plant
Manufacturer: Amon & Reese Co.
Size: 2
Grade: D
Class: Military

Simple and direct, the ExoGen generates power in traditional A&R style: no fuss, just solid craftsmanship.

powr_amrs_s02_turbodrive.description:
Item Type: Power Plant
Manufacturer: Amon & Reese Co.
Size: 2
Grade: C
Class: Military

The TurboDrive is a common military-grade power plant from A&R that slightly favors performance over durability and stealth.

powr_amrs_s03_megaflux.description:
Item Type: Power Plant
Manufacturer: Amon & Reese Co.
Size: 3
Grade: B
Class: Military

Repeated requests from military veterans to make the MegaFlux commercially available convinced A&R Co. to release this large power plant to the public.

powr_amrs_s03_smartgen.description:
Item Type: Power Plant
Manufacturer: Amon & Reese Co.
Size: 3
Grade: D
Class: Military

The no-frills SmartGen is A&R’s entry-level large power plant that delivers solid performance for the price.

powr_just_s00_defiant.description:
Item Type: Power Plant
Manufacturer: Juno Starwerk
Size: 0
Grade: B
Class: Industrial

In this cutthroat universe, the competition doesn’t stop when you do. That’s why you need the Defiant industrial power plant equipped in your vehicle. It’s optimized by the experts at Juno Starwerk to provide unmatched performance compared to other components in its class.

powr_just_s00_steadfast.description:
Item Type: Power Plant
Manufacturer: Juno Starwerk
Size: 0
Grade: C
Class: Industrial

When the road ahead is long, Juno Starwerk’s Steadfast power plant is there to see you and your vehicle through to the end by providing on-demand power and durability.

powr_just_s01_breton.description:
Item Type: Power Plant
Manufacturer: Juno Starwerk
Size: 1
Grade: A
Class: Industrial

The Breton embodies exactly what Juno Starwerk engineers wanted out of an industrial power plant — utilitarian, easy to repair and extremely powerful. You’ll be hard pressed to find a better balance of performance and durability from a unit this size.

powr_just_s01_endurance.description:
Item Type: Power Plant
Manufacturer: Juno Starwerk
Size: 1
Grade: B
Class: Industrial

Juno Starwerk’s Endurance has been in service since the 26th century. This industrial strength, utilitarian power plant is a favorite of mechanics since spare parts are easily acquired.

powr_just_s01_fortitude.description:
Item Type: Power Plant
Manufacturer: Juno Starwerk
Size: 1
Grade: C
Class: Industrial

Beloved by haulers for centuries, the Fortitude lives up to its name by reliably producing power when needed most.

powr_just_s02_diligence.description:
Item Type: Power Plant
Manufacturer: Juno Starwerk
Size: 2
Grade: C
Class: Industrial

Though the Diligence delivers high performance compared to other components in its class, this power plant’s dependability and ease of maintenance is what makes it a favorite of haulers.

powr_just_s02_sedulity.description:
Item Type: Power Plant
Manufacturer: Juno Starwerk
Size: 2
Grade: B
Class: Industrial

When you need a power plant that’s as reliable as you are, then snag yourself a Sedulity. This component has been a staple of the Juno Starwerk line for years, making it truly worthy of the name.

powr_just_s03_durango.description:
Item Type: Power Plant
Manufacturer: Juno Starwerk
Size: 3
Grade: A
Class: Industrial

The Durango is the peak of large power plants produced by Juno Starwerk. This top-of-the-line industrial component provides unmatched energy dispersion that minimizes fluctuations and surges during heavy demand.

powr_just_s03_reliance.description:
Item Type: Power Plant
Manufacturer: Juno Starwerk
Size: 3
Grade: B
Class: Industrial

Haulers have been a fan of the Reliance power plant for years. The component’s clean design and Juno Starwerk’s lauded customer support have made this power plant a fixture on ships around the Empire.

powr_lplt_s00_ionwave.description:
Item Type: Power Plant
Manufacturer: Lightning Power Ltd.
Size: 0
Grade: B
Class: Civilian

The IonWave vehicle power plant can help you confidently summit the heights of most peaks without overheating thanks to the incredible technology inside designed by the folks at Lightning Power Ltd.

powr_lplt_s00_radix.description:
Item Type: Power Plant
Manufacturer: Lightning Power Ltd.
Size: 0
Grade: C
Class: Civilian

With more than enough get up and go to handle your vehicle’s daily energy needs, the Radix from Lightning Power Ltd. is a power plant you can count on to get you where you’re going.

powr_lplt_s01_ionburst.description:
Item Type: Power Plant
Manufacturer: Lightning Power Ltd.
Size: 1
Grade: B
Class: Civilian

The IonBurst is touted by Lightning Power as being a best-in-class power plant, providing unequaled performance for the price.

powr_lplt_s02_fullforce.description:
Item Type: Power Plant
Manufacturer: Lightning Power Ltd.
Size: 2
Grade: C
Class: Civilian

This power plant from Lightning Power Ltd. delivers balanced performance, durability and emissions, providing consumers with a “FullForce” of options as to how to use it.

powr_lplt_s02_sparkjet.description:
Item Type: Power Plant
Manufacturer: Lightning Power Ltd.
Size: 2
Grade: D
Class: Civilian

The SparkJet is a basic power plant from Lighting Power Ltd. that strives to balance heat and EM emissions with overall performance and durability.

powr_lplt_s03_ionsurgepro.description:
Item Type: Power Plant
Manufacturer: Lightning Power Ltd.
Size: 3
Grade: B
Class: Civilian

Power plants from Lightning Power Ltd. don’t get much bigger or better than the IonSurge Pro. This top-of-the-line large power plant focuses on delivering solid results to keep your ship working longer.

powr_sasu_s01_lightblossom.description:
Item Type: Power Plant
Manufacturer: Sakura Sun
Size: 1
Grade: C
Class: Civilian

Featuring stylish design and strong performance, the LightBlossom is a worthy addition to Sakura Sun’s line-up, continuing the reputation the conglomerate has for making everything and making it well.

powr_sasu_s01_magnabloom.description:
Item Type: Power Plant
Manufacturer: Sakura Sun
Size: 1
Grade: B
Class: Civilian

The MagnaBloom power plant achieves above average performance and durability with minimal excess emissions, making it another exquisitely designed component from Sakura Sun.

powr_sasu_s02_radiance.description:
Item Type: Power Plant
Manufacturer: Sakura Sun
Size: 2
Grade: B
Class: Civilian

Considering its extensive and extremely diverse line of products, it’s incredible that Sakura Sun can maintain such quality and consistency. The Radiance power plant is a perfect example. A staple of their product line for years, the Radiance has won multiple consumer awards for its reliability and overall performance.

powr_sasu_s03_celestial.description:
Item Type: Power Plant
Manufacturer: Sakura Sun
Size: 3
Grade: B
Class: Civilian

The Celestial from Sakura Sun improves upon the company’s base large power plant by redesigning the power rate and other key aspects to raise the component’s overall performance.

powr_sasu_s03_newdawn.description:
Item Type: Power Plant
Manufacturer: Sakura Sun
Size: 3
Grade: C
Class: Civilian

The NewDawn was appropriately named, as it was the first large power plant built by Sakura Sun. Following its commercial success, the company decided to expand and improve upon their line of large power plants.

powr_tydt_s01_slipstream.description:
Item Type: Power Plant
Manufacturer: Tyler Design & Tech
Size: 1
Grade: A
Class: Stealth

Tyler Design & Tech uses an expensive alloy on its Slipstream power plant to reduce its overall emissions. This design choice is key to making this small power plant’s detectable signature one of the lowest on the market.

powr_tydt_s01_soniclite.description:
Item Type: Power Plant
Manufacturer: Tyler Design & Tech
Size: 1
Grade: C
Class: Stealth

Constructed from the ground up to minimize your heat signature, Tyler Design’s SonicLite power plant has gained a following among pilots who appreciate a subtler approach.

powr_tydt_s02_cirrus.description:
Item Type: Power Plant
Manufacturer: Tyler Design & Tech
Size: 2
Grade: C
Class: Stealth

The Cirrus is for pilots that prioritize stealth above all else. This medium power plant from Tyler Design & Tech intelligently manages its energy distribution flow and performance output to achieve that end.

powr_vncl_s01_hellsheart.description:
Item Type: Power Plant
Manufacturer: Vanduul
Size: 1
Grade: N/A
Class: Military

The military designation for this Vanduul power plant is thought to have originated as a reference made by a well-educated pilot that the Vanduul fighters seem to be “stabbing at us from hell's heart.”

patch_case_1_a.description: Mounted inside a beautiful display case, this collection features three patches honoring the naval bases used over the centuries to train recruits into the brave starmen who dedicate their lives to defending Humanity.

powerbank.description: An extremely powerful battery used in industrial processes, like powering mining lasers. Its proprietary design generates significantly more energy than other batteries of its size but makes the GP-XP extremely heavy and unwieldy. Please use caution when attempting to move.

qdrv_arcc_s01_burst.description:
Item Type: Quantum Drive
Manufacturer: ArcCorp
Size: 1
Grade: B
Class: Civilian

With the Burst quantum drive, ArcCorp has taken their popular Rush model and through streamlined re-engineering, managed to improve upon it.

qdrv_arcc_s02_flash.description:
Item Type: Quantum Drive
Manufacturer: ArcCorp
Size: 2
Grade: B
Class: Civilian

With improved spooling and calibration, the new ArcCorp Flash drive can get you in and out of quantum easier and faster.

qdrv_arcc_s02_torrent.description:
Item Type: Quantum Drive
Manufacturer: ArcCorp
Size: 2
Grade: C
Class: Civilian

Whatever destination you choose, the ArcCorp Torrent quantum drive is a solid choice to help get you there direct and hassle-free.

qdrv_just_s01_colossus.description:
Item Type: Quantum Drive
Manufacturer: Juno Starwerk
Size: 1
Grade: B
Class: Industrial

Juno Starwerk makes quantum drives that can go the distance and the Colossus is no exception. Though, once you experience its dependable performance for yourself, you might just want to call it exceptional.

qdrv_just_s02_yaluk.description:
Item Type: Quantum Drive
Manufacturer: Juno Starwerk
Size: 2
Grade: D
Class: Industrial

The bigger the haul, the harder your quantum drive has to work. With Juno Starwerk’s Yaluk onboard, you’ll know that you have a quantum drive that is up to the challenge of getting the job done.

qdrv_raco_s01_zephyr.description:
Item Type: Quantum Drive
Manufacturer: RAMP Corporation
Size: 1
Grade: B
Class: Stealth

By minimizing emissions through an advanced reduced outflow filtration process, the RAMP Zephyr quantum drive helps ensure privacy while traveling wherever you go.

qdrv_rsi_s01_atlas.description:
Item Type: Quantum Drive
Manufacturer: RSI
Size: 1
Grade: A
Class: Civilian

Though it may seem commonplace today, Humanity’s ability to travel across solar systems at quantum speeds was built upon a foundation of Roberts Space Industries’ technology and craftsmanship. Now, space travel has reached even higher heights thanks to the top-of-class performance of RSI’s Atlas pushing quantum drive technology farther than it’s ever gone.

qdrv_rsi_s02_hemera.description:
Item Type: Quantum Drive
Manufacturer: RSI
Size: 2
Grade: A
Class: Civilian

Designing the Hemera quantum drive has allowed the technicians at Robert Space Industries to push the boundaries of quantum travel technology even further, and allow you to go even farther.

qdrv_tars_s01_voyage.description:
Item Type: Quantum Drive
Manufacturer: Tarsus
Size: 1
Grade: B
Class: Civilian

Crafted by passionate people who have been leading the way in space exploration and travel for over six centuries, the Voyage by Tarsus is a quantum drive worthy of your next expedition.

qdrv_tars_s02_sojourn.description:
Item Type: Quantum Drive
Manufacturer: Tarsus
Size: 2
Grade: B
Class: Civilian

When you explore a star system, it should be about the experiences, the sights, the memories. The Tarsus Sojourn quantum drive takes all the worry out of quantum travel so that you can focus on what’s important, the journey.

qdrv_wetk_s01_vk00.description:
Item Type: Quantum Drive
Manufacturer: Wei-Tek
Size: 1
Grade: A
Class: Military

When the stakes are high, Wei-Tek’s advanced VK-00 quantum drive is the only choice you should trust to get you where you need to be.

qdrv_wetk_s02_yeager.description:
Item Type: Quantum Drive
Manufacturer: Wei-Tek
Size: 2
Grade: B
Class: Military

Whether you’re rushing to the rescue or simply patrolling through a sector, the Yeager quantum drive from Wei-Tek allows for greater performance when you need it most.

qrdv_acas_s01_foxfire.description:
Item Type: Quantum Drive
Manufacturer: Ace Astrogation
Size: 1
Grade: B
Class: Competition

The FoxFire won't leave a burning trail in your wake, but this quantum drive’s strong performance leaves an equal impression. Making it another elegant and powerful component from the folks at Ace Astrogation.

qrdv_acas_s01_lightfire.description:
Item Type: Quantum Drive
Manufacturer: Ace Astrogation
Size: 1
Grade: C
Class: Competition

Ace Astrogation built the LightFire for pilots who like to push the edge, but not break the bank. Its focused design provides solid performance at the expense of the component’s durability and stealth.

r6p_boots_01_01_shared.description: These rugged and durable boots from R6 Pro are perfect to wear on your ship or while planetside. Padded insole cushions ensure they'll also be comfortable in any situation. \n\nWomen's sizes currently out of stock.

r6p_shoes_01_01_01.description: The WK-8 impact boots from R6 Pro continue the company's proud tradition of affordable, durable utility footwear. Designed to thrive in all kinds of environments, the WK-8's are the result of extensive field testing with the Empire's most trusted security operatives.

radr_bltr_s01_hunter.description:
Item Type: Radar
Manufacturer: Blue Triangle Inc.
Size: 1
Grade: B
Class: Stealth

When a low signature is of the utmost importance, the Hunter stealth radar will keep you aware of what’s around without getting you found.

radr_bltr_s01_pelerous.description:
Item Type: Radar
Manufacturer: Blue Triangle Inc.
Size: 1
Grade: C
Class: Stealth

Aggressors can’t attack what they can’t see, so keep your signature low with the Pelorous stealth radar from Blue Triangle Inc.

radr_bltr_s01_prophet.description:
Item Type: Radar
Manufacturer: Blue Triangle Inc.
Size: 1
Grade: A
Class: Stealth

The art of seeing without being seen has never been better exemplified than by the Prophet radar system. Blue Triangle Inc. has managed to maximize sensitivity while minimizing pulse emissions to create a radar ideal for remaining off other people’s.

radr_bltr_s02_cassandra.description:
Item Type: Radar
Manufacturer: Blue Triangle Inc.
Size: 2
Grade: A
Class: Stealth

When staying undetected is the key to operational security, the Cassandra radar features reduced emissions while still providing above average performance.

radr_bltr_s02_predator.description:
Item Type: Radar
Manufacturer: Blue Triangle Inc.
Size: 2
Grade: B
Class: Stealth

Created for those that want to keep a low profile, the Predator radar operates with low electromagnetic emissions, to help reduce your signature.

radr_bltr_s02_spyglass.description:
Item Type: Radar
Manufacturer: Blue Triangle Inc.
Size: 2
Grade: C
Class: Stealth

Designed to help you remain undetected by hostile parties, the Spyglass radar operates with lower emissions while still giving you the full picture.

radr_chco_s00_broadspecgo.description:
Item Type: Radar
Manufacturer: Chimera Communications
Size: 0
Grade: B
Class: Industrial

The BroadSpec-Go was designed with accuracy, reliability, and durability in mind. And that's exactly what this radar provides.

radr_chco_s00_fullspecgo.description:
Item Type: Radar
Manufacturer: Chimera Communications
Size: 0
Grade: A
Class: Industrial

Chimera Communications knows that for a high quality radar, consistency is key. The FullSpec-Go, specifically designed to offer clarity in the most hazardous of terrain, guarantees you'll get where you need to go without any surprises.

radr_chco_s00_surveyorgo.description:
Item Type: Radar
Manufacturer: Chimera Communications
Size: 0
Grade: C
Class: Industrial

The SurveyorGo is a vehicle-sized version of Chimera Communications' popular line of radars.

radr_chco_s01_broadspeclite.description:
Item Type: Radar
Manufacturer: Chimera Communications
Size: 1
Grade: B
Class: Industrial

Whether it’s tracking the members of your convoy or keeping an eye out for trouble, Chimera Communications understands how important your radar can be. That’s why they developed the Broadspec-Lite to have the range and sensitivity that’s so crucial to today’s operators.

radr_chco_s01_observergo.description:
Item Type: Radar
Manufacturer: Chimera Communications
Size: 1
Grade: D
Class: Industrial

Designed to be as accessible as possible, the Observer-Go is a strong entry-level radar for those that want to keep themselves informed without breaking the bank.

radr_chco_s01_observerlite.description:
Item Type: Radar
Manufacturer: Chimera Communications
Size: 1
Grade: D
Class: Industrial

The Observer-Lite is a no-frills radar ready for those long hauls. Trust the brand that focuses on how good a radar works and not just how it looks.

radr_chco_s01_surveyorlite.description:
Item Type: Radar
Manufacturer: Chimera Communications
Size: 1
Grade: C
Class: Industrial

There’s a lot for you to worry about on those long hauls. Don’t let your radar’s performance be one of them. You can count on the Surveyor-Lite from Chimera Communications to provide the durability and performance that you need.

radr_chco_s02_broadspec.description:
Item Type: Radar
Manufacturer: Chimera Communications
Size: 2
Grade: B
Class: Industrial

The Chimera Communications BroadSpec radar has an important job to do and does it well, detecting a wide range of emissions and signatures with a dependability you can count on.

radr_chco_s02_fullspec.description:
Item Type: Radar
Manufacturer: Chimera Communications
Size: 2
Grade: A
Class: Industrial

The FullSpec radar is considered by many to be one of the most dependable radar systems you can equip your rig with on the market today. Chimera Communications has worked hard to reduce false positives while improving consistency over range and the results speak for themselves.

radr_chco_s02_observer.description:
Item Type: Radar
Manufacturer: Chimera Communications
Size: 2
Grade: D
Class: Industrial

Using formerly classified military technology, this now publically available radar is designed to offer key information to the user.

radr_chco_s02_surveyor.description:
Item Type: Radar
Manufacturer: Chimera Communications
Size: 2
Grade: C
Class: Industrial

The Surveyor radar from Chimera Communications does away with all the unnecessary extras other manufacturers hide behind to focus on what matters: signature and emission detection that works the way you need it to.

radr_chco_s03_fullspecmax.description:
Item Type: Radar
Manufacturer: Chimera Communications
Size: 3
Grade: A
Class: Industrial

Keep your targets in your sights with the FullSpec-Max radar featuring advanced hard-working systems that excel at identifying potential threats.

radr_chco_s03_observermax.description:
Item Type: Radar
Manufacturer: Chimera Communications

radr_chco_s04_broadspecmax.description:

Size: 4
Grade: B

radr_grnp_s01_ecouter.description:

Size: 1
Grade: C
Class: Military

Space is vast and unknowable, that’s why discerning pilots rely on the Ecouter small radar from GNP to keep them in the know about what’s around them.

radr_grnp_s01_tige.description:
Item Type: Radar
Manufacturer: GNP
Size: 1
Grade: B
Class: Military

Situational awareness is key when engaging with hostiles. The GNP developed the Tige radar with improved accuracy to helps ensure that any viable contacts are detected.

radr_grnp_s01_v80111.description:
Item Type: Radar
Manufacturer: GNP
Size: 1
Grade: A
Class: Military

Designed for the battlefield, the V801-11 is a cut above the rest thanks to the rigid, iterative testing, guaranteeing its performance when you need it most.

radr_grnp_s01_voir.description:
Item Type: Radar
Manufacturer: GNP
Size: 1
Grade: D
Class: Military

The Voir is not just for the military anymore. Now you too can attach this small radar to your ship to stay safe.

radr_grnp_s02_epier.description:
Item Type: Radar
Manufacturer: GNP
Size: 2
Grade: C

GNP’s finely tuned Epier medium radar delivers military grade stats for advanced signature detection wherever your mission takes you.

radr_grnp_s02_savoir.description:
Item Type: Radar
Manufacturer: Groupe Nouveau Paradigme
Size: 2
Grade: D
Class: Military

Boasting a decent range and energy efficiency, the Savoir is a radar designed for those that favor reliability.

radr_grnp_s02_v80112.description:
Item Type: Radar
Manufacturer: GNP
Size: 2
Grade: A
Class: Military

During field operations, the GNP V801-12 radar system allows for increased strategic planning owing to its capability for detecting a wide variety of emission signatures, revealing hazards and hostiles alike.

radr_grnp_s02_vigilance.description:
Item Type: Radar
Manufacturer: GNP
Size: 2
Grade: B
Class: Military

Vigilance means keeping a careful watch for any possible dangerous threats and the GNP radar that bears this name allows you to do just that with its proprietary emission accrual.

radr_grnp_s03_devoue.description:
Item Type: Radar
Manufacturer: Groupe Nouveau Paradigme
Size: 3
Grade: B
Class: Military

The Devoue radar is able to render nearby energy emissions accurately and quickly, allowing you to retain control even in the most dire situations.

radr_grnp_s03_fidele.description:
Item Type: Radar
Manufacturer: Groupe Nouveau Paradigme
Size: 3
Grade: D
Class: Military

Focusing on the core features of a radar, the Fidele operates efficiently even in battle conditions.

radr_grnp_s03_resolu.description:
Item Type: Radar
Manufacturer: Groupe Nouveau Paradigme
Size: 3
Grade: C
Class: Military

Invented with larger ships in mind, the Resolu radar provides the same level of three-dimensional scanning technology without sacrificing dependability.

radr_grnp_s03_v880.description:
Item Type: Radar
Manufacturer: Groupe Nouveau Paradigme
Size: 3
Grade: A
Class: Military

Providing useful assistance when detecting hostiles, the V880 brings the power of military technology to the consumer market.

radr_nave_s01_snsr5.description:
Item Type: Radar
Manufacturer: Nav-E7 Gadgets
Size: 1
Grade: D
