The SNSR5 radar small size and dependable performance makes it the perfect device for entry-level users.

radr_nave_s01_snsr6.description:
Item Type: Radar
Manufacturer: Nav-E7
Size: 1
Grade: C
Class: Competition

Increased power and performance makes the SNS-R6 stand out from other radars in its class. Get yours today to see why pilots the Empire over love components from Nav-E7 Gadgets.

radr_nave_s01_snsr7.description:
Item Type: Radar
Manufacturer: Nav-E7 Gadgets
Size: 1
Grade: B
Class: Competition

Engineered to give your vehicle the edge, the SNSR7 provides real-time tracking information on all surrounding emissions.

radr_nave_s02_snsr5x.description:
Item Type: Radar
Manufacturer: Nav-E7 Gadgets
Size: 2
Grade: D
Class: Competition

Perfect for an entry-level pilot, the SNS-R5x trades excessive frills for energy efficiency.

radr_nave_s02_snsr6x.description:
Item Type: Radar
Manufacturer: Nav-E7 Gadgets
Size: 2
Grade: C
Class: Competition

The SNS-R6x provides certainty when detecting electromagnetic emissions, as well as offering reasonable levels of energy efficiency.

radr_nave_s02_snsr7x.description:
Item Type: Radar
Manufacturer: Nav-E7 Gadgets
Size: 2
Grade: B
Class: Competition

Favoring energy efficiency above all, the SNS-R7x is a radar is ideal for those looking to manage their ship's levels effectively, whilst still providing excellent vision.

radr_wlop_s00_denning.description:
Item Type: Radar
Manufacturer: WillsOp
Size: 0
Grade: C

With the Denning, you can now equip an award winning WillsOp radar to your vehicle.

radr_wlop_s00_fabian.description:
Item Type: Radar

Size: 0
Grade: A

Utilizing best-in-class scanning technology, the Fabian radar ensures you won't be caught unaware.

radr_wlop_s00_vogel.description:
Item Type: Radar
Manufacturer: WillsOp
Size: 0
Grade: B
Class: Civilian

As you ride to destinations new and afar, uncover the unknown with the Vogel radar from WillsOp that features innovative signature filtration and detection algorithms.

radr_wlop_s01_abetti.description:
Item Type: Radar
Manufacturer: WillsOp
Size: 1
Grade: A
Class: Civilian

Supplying high powered detection technology, the Abetti's advanced systems offer a responsive radar experience.

radr_wlop_s01_backlund.description:
Item Type: Radar
Manufacturer: WillsOp
Size: 1
Grade: B
Class: Civilian

Wherever you fly, the WillsOp Backlund radar is perfect for gathering information on what’s nearby and detecting a variety of emission signatures.

radr_wlop_s01_capston.description:
Item Type: Radar
Manufacturer: WillsOp
Size: 1
Grade: C
Class: Civilian

Experience why WillsOp is a premiere manufacturer of ship electronics with their Capston radar. Outfit your ship with one today so you know what’s nearby.

radr_wlop_s01_fleming.description:
Item Type: Radar
Manufacturer: WillsOp
Size: 1
Grade: D
Class: Civilian

The Fleming is WillsOp’s base small radar. What it lacks in bells and whistles, it makes up for with consistent performance.

radr_wlop_s02_agrippa.description:
Item Type: Radar
Manufacturer: WillsOp
Size: 2
Grade: A
Class: Civilian

A superior quality radar able to accurate provide information on your vehicle's surroundings.

radr_wlop_s02_battani.description:
Item Type: Radar
Manufacturer: WillsOp
Size: 2
Grade: B
Class: Civilian

Expand your horizons with the WilsOp Battani radar and its advanced passive detection system.

radr_wlop_s02_chernykh.description:
Item Type: Radar
Manufacturer: WillsOp
Size: 2
Grade: C
Class: Civilian

The Chernykh is named after the famed 26th century engineer who designed some of the most prized radars of that era. This medium radar from WillsOp celebrates both the look and performance of those classic components.

radr_wlop_s02_fawad.description:
Item Type: Radar
Manufacturer: WillsOp
Size: 2
Grade: D
Class: Civilian

The Fawad entry-level radar from WillsOp is the perfect choice for someone who is looking for a no-frills signature detection system perfect for everyday use.

radr_wlop_s03_anysta.description:
Item Type: Radar
Manufacturer: WillsOp
Size: 3
Grade: A
Class: Civilian

Avoid getting tunnel vision with the Anysta radar. Offering exceptional performance all round, this radar will help keep you informed.

radr_wlop_s03_capsulo.description:
Item Type: Radar
Manufacturer: WillsOp
Size: 3
Grade: B
Class: Civilian

For a dependable radar with above average performance, the Capsulo is a trustworthy option.

radr_wlop_s03_socoria.description:
Item Type: Radar
Manufacturer: WillsOp
Size: 3
Grade: D
Class: Civilian

The Socoria is a well-rounded radar providing everything a pilot needs for an effective radar at a reasonable price point.

rmb_goggles_01.description: Tech meets tough with the Avalos Scout goggles. Their unique and sturdy frame ensures that the lenses remain intact even after unexpected impacts or sudden atmospheric changes. Built for harsh environments but bold enough to be worn anywhere.

rmb_goggles_02.description: Outfitted with Rambler's scratch resistant lenses, the Aponte Explorer goggles provides a clear view of the path ahead. Their wraparound design keeps dirt and debris away while on windy plains, but still look stylish enough to wear when walking through bustling city streets.

scu_hat_02_01_01.description: The IronBand is another in Stegman's award-winning line of safety wear. Built from top-grade impact resistant materials, the IronBand has undergone rigorous safety testing to provide maximum protection in the worst of conditions.

scu_hat_03_01_01.description: Stegman's Hardline 7800 is the latest in a proud line of safety wear. The Hardline is constructed from the same high-density plastics used in some body armor.

scu_pants_01_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 2K µSCU\n\nWith Stegman's, you know you're getting clothes made for workers, by workers. Featuring multiple external pockets with easy access tabs, WorkLife pants are rugged, functional and professional. Just like you.

scu_gloves_02_01_imperator.description: Toss out your old boring work gloves and replace them with the Davin Pathfinder edition. These special work gloves combine Stegman's classic, sturdy construction with a supremely comfortable lining and a striking silver color.

scu_goggles_01.description: Supremely comfortable yet light as a feather, the Haruspec goggles also provide excellent protection against the elements thanks to their sturdy side shields. Stegman's fitted the goggles with polycarbonate performance lenses and a special slip-resistant nose pad to ensure they stay in place.

scu_goggles_02.description: Stegman's SightRight goggles strike a careful balance between ultralight comfort and professional-quality protection. The enhanced polycarbonate frame offers maximum eye safety with a durable scratch-resistant lens construction that also features an award-winning anti-fog coating to maintain visibility in the harshest of worksites.

scu_jacket_02_01_imperator.description:
Carrying Capacity: 5K µSCU

Keep your tools within easy reach with Stegman's IndVest. The exclusive Pathfinder edition is made from black industrial strength materials that includes both purple and silver highlights. A rare jacket that's both stylish and sensible. 

Women's sizes currently out of stock.

scu_jacket_03_01_centurion.description: Carrying Capacity: 3K µSCU\n\nStegman's classic worker's jacket has been a staple of job sites for over seventy years. The exclusive Voyager edition blends red and black with gold highlights to provide a stylish edge, making the Cordimon tough, durable, and perfect to wear anytime, anywhere.

scu_pants_02_01_imperator.description: Carrying Capacity: 4K µSCU\n\nA reinforced nylon weave and temperature-rated quilted technology make Edgewear pants ideal for any jobsite. This staple of Stegman's line of utility clothes comes with double knees, reinforced joint pads, and extra pockets. The exclusive Pathfinder edition comes in purple with black and silver accents.

scu_pants_03_01_centurion.description: Carrying Capacity: 2K µSCU\n\nStegman uses a tough composite weave fabric and double knees to ensure these all-purpose pants are comfortable yet durable. The Voyager edition is black with a large red tool pocket and gold knee pads.

scu_shirt_01_01_centurion.description: The Voyager edition of this Henley shirt is red with black trim and gold sleeves. It features Stegman's famous AirFlow technology, a stain-resistant, air-cooled fabric that keeps you comfortable and dry.\n\nWomen's sizes currently out of stock.

shld_asas_s01_mirage.description:
Item Type: Shield Generator
Manufacturer: Ascension Astro
Size: 1
Grade: A
Class: Stealth

By boasting a signature so faint most won’t believe it’s there, Ascension Astro’s top of the line small shield generator lives up to its name — Mirage. It’s the ultimate component for those who want to go unnoticed.

shld_asas_s01_veil.description:
Item Type: Shield Generator
Manufacturer: Ascension Astro
Size: 1
Grade: B
Class: Stealth

An advanced cooling system significantly reduces the heat produced by the Veil stealth shield generator. No other component in its class even comes close to rivaling its heat suppression technology.

shld_asas_s02_obscura.description:
Item Type: Shield Generator
Manufacturer: Ascension Astro
Size: 2
Grade: C
Class: Stealth

Respected for its lower emissions, the Obscura shield generator uses an advanced signature dispersal system to help give your ship a quieter signature while still remaining shielded.

shld_asas_s02_sheut.description:
Item Type: Shield Generator
Manufacturer: Ascension Astro
Size: 2
Grade: B
Class: Stealth

Keep your shield’s heat from giving you away by using a Sheut. Another outstanding stealth shield generator from Ascension Astro.

shld_asas_s02_umbra.description:
Item Type: Shield Generator
Manufacturer: Ascension Astro
Size: 2
Grade: A
Class: Stealth

Slip through the darkness of space like a phantom with the Umbra stealth shield generator. Best when used in conjunction with other low signature components from Ascension Astro.

shld_basl_s00_bastion.description:
Item Type: Shield Generator
Manufacturer: Basilisk
Size: 0
Grade: D
Class: Industrial

You don’t need to be a multi-system megacorp to afford an industrial-grade shield generator for your vehicle. Basilisk’s Bastion provides enhanced shield durability without breaking the bank.

shld_basl_s00_siege.description:
Item Type: Shield Generator
Manufacturer: Basilisk
Size: 0
Grade: B
Class: Industrial

The Siege generates top-of-the-line, industrial-grade durability for your vehicle’s shield. That’s why it’s the most trusted vehicle shield component.

shld_basl_s01_guardian.description:
Item Type: Shield Generator
Manufacturer: Basilisk
Size: 1
Grade: B
Class: Industrial

Upgrade to the Guardian for increased absorption of ballistic, energy, and distortion damage. Making this industrial shield generator one of the most durable in its class.

shld_basl_s01_palisade.description:
Item Type: Shield Generator
Manufacturer: Basilisk
Size: 1
Grade: A
Class: Industrial

No other small shield generator can match the durability of the Basilisk Palisade. This top-of-the-line industrial component forfeits stealth for the ability to absorb an unrivaled amount of damage.

shld_basl_s01_steward.description:
Item Type: Shield Generator
Manufacturer: Basilisk
Size: 1
Grade: D
Class: Industrial

The Steward is Basilisk’s entry-level industrial shield generator. Its reinforced housing adds an extra level of durability to an already robust system, guaranteeing that your shield will be projecting even in the harshest conditions.

shld_basl_s02_armada.description:
Item Type: Shield Generator
Manufacturer: Basilisk
Size: 2
Grade: D
Class: Industrial

Basilisk started by making cutting edge hull plating that was renowned for being durable and dependable. Today they carry on that proud legacy with industrial shield generators like the Armada.

shld_basl_s02_citadel.description:
Item Type: Shield Generator
Manufacturer: Basilisk
Size: 2
Grade: B
Class: Industrial

Fortify your ship with Basilisk’s Citadel shield generator. Tailored toward industrial vessels, the component emits a robust and reliable shield.

shld_basl_s02_rampart.description:
Item Type: Shield Generator
Manufacturer: Basilisk
Size: 2
Grade: A
Class: Industrial

Basilisk understands that escape isn’t always an option. That’s why they built the Rampart industrial shield generator to take an incredible amount of damage before it’s depleted.

shld_basl_s03_barbican.description:
Item Type: Shield Generator
Manufacturer: Basilisk
Size: 3
Grade: B
Class: Industrial

Barricade your ship against external forces with the Basilisk Barbican. Originally fabricated for large industrial vessels, this shield generator has became quite popular due to its high damage absorption.

shld_basl_s03_parapet.description:
Item Type: Shield Generator
Manufacturer: Basilisk
Size: 3
Grade: A
Class: Industrial

As the peak of Basilisk’s large industrial shield generators, it’s easy to see why the Parapet is so beloved. With one of the industry’s best shield generation to damage ratio, it’s difficult to degrade the shield and expose the hull.

shld_basl_s03_ward.description:
Item Type: Shield Generator
Manufacturer: Basilisk
Size: 3
Grade: D
Class: Industrial

The Ward is Basilisk’s basic industrial-grade shield generator for large ships. It provides decent performance and durability while also keeping its signature respectable.

shld_behr_s01_6sa.description:
Item Type: Shield Generator
Manufacturer: Behring
Size: 1
Grade: B
Class: Civilian

Providing above average shield health and damage absorption, the 6SA ‘Arbiter’ has been a trusted component for centuries. Experience the Behring advantage by installing this small shield generator today.

shld_behr_s01_7sa.description:
Item Type: Shield Generator
Manufacturer: Behring
Size: 1
Grade: A
Class: Civilian

A top-of-the-line shield generator that runs loud and proud. What it sacrifices in stealth it more than makes up for with supreme durability and excellent performance. So, even if enemies see you coming, they’ll have a hard time disabling Behring’s 7SA ‘Concord’.

shld_behr_s02_6ma.description:
Item Type: Shield Generator
Manufacturer: Behring
Size: 2
Grade: B
Class: Civilian

Behring’s ironclad reputation is almost as impenetrable as the shield produced by the 6MA ‘Kozane’. If it’s good enough for Behring, it’s good enough for you.

shld_behr_s02_7ma.description:
Item Type: Shield Generator
Manufacturer: Behring
Size: 2
Grade: A
Class: Civilian

Trust a component that has been equipped on crafts for centuries — the 7MA ‘Lorica’. Experience Behring’s top-of-the-line shield generator on your ship today.

shld_behr_s03_6ca.description:
Item Type: Shield Generator
Manufacturer: Behring
Size: 3
Grade: B
Class: Civilian

“Built by Behring” is a phrase synonymous with quality. That’s why so many around the Empire trust their 6CA ‘Bila’ large shield generator to provide them with solid performance, impressive durable, and an acceptable degree of stealth.

shld_behr_s03_7ca.description:
Item Type: Shield Generator
Manufacturer: Behring
Size: 3
Grade: A
Class: Civilian

Commercial-grade shield generators don’t get any better than the 7CA ‘Nargun’. The component utilizes Behring’s patented ‘Freeze Flow’ tech to keep its heat signature in check while increasing both its overall performance and durability.

shld_godi_s01_fr66.description:
Item Type: Shield Generator
Manufacturer: Gorgon Defender Industries
Size: 1
Grade: A
Class: Military

The FR-66 is one of the most versatile small shield generator currently on the market. Get military strength protection and performance from Gorgon Defender Industries to ensure your ship can survive any onslaught.

shld_godi_s02_coverall.description:
Item Type: Shield Generator
Manufacturer: Gorgon Defender Industries
Size: 2
Grade: B
Class: Military

Don’t sacrifice performance for durability. Get both with Gorgon Defender Industries’ CoverAll shield generator.

shld_godi_s02_fr76.description:
Item Type: Shield Generator
Manufacturer: Gorgon Defender Industries
Size: 2
Grade: A
Class: Military

Refined by years of extensive, real world testing by the military, Gorgon Defender Industries FR-76 is the ultimate shield generator. Perfect for everyone from folks defending the frontline to those exploring the frontier.

shld_godi_s02_secureshield.description:
Item Type: Shield Generator
Manufacturer: Gorgon Defender Industries
Size: 2
Grade: D
Class: Military

Get military-grade protection for your ship with the SecureShield from Gorgon Defender Industries. Their cutting edge emitter tech allows for superior shield absorption across the spectrum of damage types.

shld_godi_s03_fr86.description:
Item Type: Shield Generator
Manufacturer: Gorgon Defender Industries
Size: 3
Grade: A
Class: Military

Gorgon’s FR-86 is tried, tested, and trusted. No other large shield generator delivers both exceptional performance and durability to this degree.

shld_godi_s03_fullblock.description:
Item Type: Shield Generator
Manufacturer: Gorgon Defender Industries
Size: 3
Grade: B
Class: Military

Crafted by former residents of Caliban, Gorgon’s FullBlock large shield generator has been repeatedly put to the test by members of the military and public. That means you can count on it regardless of what you come up against.

shld_godi_s03_securescreen.description:
Item Type: Shield Generator
Manufacturer: Gorgon Defender Industries
Size: 3
Grade: D
Class: Military

Gorgon Defender Industries brings military might to their entry-level, large shield generator. Featuring best-in-class durability, the SecureScreen was built to take a beating and survive.

shld_seco_s00_loc.description:
Item Type: Shield Generator
Manufacturer: Seal Corporation
Size: 0
Grade: B
Class: Civilian

The LOC adapts Seal Corp’s revolutionary ship energy shield for vehicles. It provides premiere protection against oppressive forces found on the ground or hovering above.

shld_seco_s00_red.description:
Item Type: Shield Generator
Manufacturer: Seal Corporation
Size: 0
Grade: D
Class: Civilian

Seal Corp reworked their classic component to make the RED vehicle shield generator both effective and affordable.

shld_seco_s01_hex.description:
Item Type: Shield Generator
Manufacturer: Seal Corporation
Size: 1
Grade: B
Class: Civilian

Prepare your ship for any circumstance by installing a HEX from Seal Corporation. Balanced performance and durability make this an ideal, versatile choice for those who don’t know where their next adventure may take them.

shld_seco_s02_bloc.description:
Item Type: Shield Generator
Manufacturer: Seal Corporation
Size: 2
Grade: B
Class: Civilian

Seal Corporation’s BLOC shield generator was the first to use the company’s revolutionary quantum core semiconductor to reduce the component’s power draw without compromising performance.

shld_seco_s02_rpel.description:
Item Type: Shield Generator
Manufacturer: Seal Corporation
Size: 2
Grade: D
Class: Civilian

See why more people trust Seal Corporation to protect their ship than any other company. With the RPEL shield generator you can be certain you’ll be sealed off from danger.

shld_seco_s03_armor.description:
Item Type: Shield Generator
Manufacturer: Seal Corporation
Size: 3
Grade: B
Class: Civilian

ARMOR is Seal Corps’ top-of-the-line shield generator. It was used extensively by the military prior to its shield tech being declassified for civilian use.

shld_seco_s03_guard.description:
Item Type: Shield Generator
Manufacturer: Seal Corporation
Size: 3
Grade: C
Class: Civilian

Don’t be afraid to go up against the unknown with Seal Corp’s GUARD. This shield generator balances performance, durability, and stealth to allow the user to utilize the shield in whatever way suits them best.

shld_seco_s03_haven.description:
Item Type: Shield Generator
Manufacturer: Seal Corporation
Size: 3
Grade: D
Class: Civilian

The HAVEN is an admired shield generator for large ships. Seal Corp’s simple, clean design makes repairing the component an easy and affordable task, and has only increased its popularity over the years.

shld_vncl_s01_hide.description:
Item Type: Shield Generator
Manufacturer: Vanduul
Size: 1
Grade: N/A
Class: Military

The Vanduul’s aggressive dog fighting tactics are possible because this shield generator provides them the protection to do so.

shld_yorm_s01_jaghte.description:
Item Type: Shield Generator
Manufacturer: Yorm
Size: 1
Grade: B
Class: Competition

Built with performance in mind, Yorm’s Jaghte competition shield generator prioritizes shield health and generation rate over strength and stealth.

shld_yorm_s02_bamoty.description:
Item Type: Shield Generator
Manufacturer: Yorm
Size: 2
Grade: D
Class: Competition

The Bamoty is Yorm’s take on a commercial style shield generator. This medium-sized component has won the company a wider fanbase because it expertly balances performance, durability, and stealth.

shld_yorm_s02_haltur.description:
Item Type: Shield Generator
Manufacturer: Yorm
Size: 2
Grade: B
Class: Competition

Strong shield health and an exceptional generation rate gives the Haltur the best performance ranking of any shield in its class. Beloved by racers and those who prefer to navigate away from danger instead of soaking it up.

shld_yorm_s02_trenta.description:
Item Type: Shield Generator
Manufacturer: Yorm
Size: 2
Grade: C
Class: Competition

An ideal choice for racers looking for a shield generator that provides above average shield performance and durability. As a bonus, the Trenta’s casing is constructed out of a magnesium infused alloy which makes the component both sturdy yet lightweight.

spv_jacket_01_01_shared.description:
Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU

Refined enough for day, but ready for night, this jacket is essential for any young professional's collection. Notched lapels and a center back seam provide a tailored look at the Spar Van Miles price.

Women's sizes currently out of stock.

spv_glasses_01.description: A distinct one piece lens with a unique geometric design makes the AvantX glasses stand out from the crowd. SPV expertly blends cutting edge style and technology for a distinct look and feel that's fashion forward.

srvl_combat_light_arms_01.description:
Item Type: Light Armor
Damage Reduction: 20%
Temp. Rating: -35 / 65 °C
Radiation Protection: 26000 REM
Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s
Carrying Capacity: 2.0 µSCU

This armor was created using repurposed parts from a Caldera armor set to provide the wearer with an extra layer of protection against aggressors and harsh environments.

srvl_combat_light_core_01.description:
Item Type: Light Armor
Damage Reduction: 20%
Temp. Rating: -32 / 62 °C
Radiation Protection: 26000 REM
Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s
Carrying Capacity: 2.0 µSCU
Backpacks: Light

This armor was created using repurposed parts from a Caldera armor set to provide the wearer with an extra layer of protection against aggressors and harsh environments.

srvl_combat_light_legs_01.description:
Item Type: Light Armor
Damage Reduction: 20%
Temp. Rating: -35 / 65 °C
Radiation Protection: 26000 REM
Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s
Carrying Capacity: 2.0 µSCU

This armor was created using repurposed parts from a Caldera armor set to provide the wearer with an extra layer of protection against aggressors and harsh environments.

srvl_parasite_helmet_01.description:
Item Type: Flight Helmet
Damage Reduction: 10%
Temp. Rating: -30 / 60 °C
Radiation Protection: 15200 REM
Radiation Scrub Rate: 81 REM/s

The original Parasite vid established a new face of fear and terrified the Empire. This iconic look can now be yours with the Parasite Replica helmet from CC's Conversions. Digital scans of the original prop helped to reproduce every gruesome detail. Despite its distinct design, the Parasite Replica helmet is space-rated and fully functional. It can be safely worn both in and out of atmosphere, or wherever you're looking to scare someone.

srvl_parasite_helmet_02.description:
Item Type: Flight Helmet
Damage Reduction: 10%
Temp. Rating: -30 / 60 °C
Radiation Protection: 15200 REM
Radiation Scrub Rate: 81 REM/s

Seven years after the original vid shocked the empire, Parasite V: Dark Birth took terror to a new level. CC's Conversions celebrated the release of the latest installment by collaborating with the vid's creators on an official and fully functional replica helmet. A special sensor built into the parasite's eye allows you a clear view of the reactions to every appalling detail. Carefully designed to honor the original prop and withstand the real rigors of space travel, the helmet is a premiere replica that will turn you into a walking nightmare!

slaver_undersuit_armor_shared.description:
Item Type: Undersuit
Damage Reduction: 5%
Temp. Rating: -30 / 60 °C
Radiation Protection: 15200 REM
Radiation Scrub Rate: 81 REM/s
G-Force Tolerance: +90%

Kastak Arms' Stoneskin series of combat undersuits are built upon CDS' famous TCS-4 system based on extensive feedback from the operators who rely on this technology in the field. Offering a myriad of options for armor and EVA capabilities, the Stoneskin is set to rival CDS as a rugged and reliable undersuit.

space_cactus.description: Capable of growing anywhere up to 5 meters in height, the Kavische is a columnar cactus hybrid that developed on Yar shortly after the introduction of floral into the newly terraformed ecosystem. Adapting the hue of the red sand, the Kavische quickly became one of the predominant plants on the planet.

space_flower.description: A member of the Tuserac family of flowers, the Emperor Blossom is one of the most recognizable indigenous plants from Terra. For most of the year, the flower is obscured, covered by what appears to be an unremarkable brown husk, similar to the Typha/Cattail of Earth. When an ideal temperature is reached, the plant enters its blooming phase: the petals peel back, revealing the striking colors underneath. Tens of thousands cross the Zaffre Bay every year for the Twilight Festival which coincides with the blooming of this beautiful flower.

tmbl_vest_biker_01_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU\n\nReveal your inner rebel with the Renegade Cut vest, featuring a wide notched lapel and metal studs on the left shoulder. High quality synthetic leather and an insulated lining give the vest both comfort and style.

tmbl_vest_cargo_01_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 3K µSCU\n\nEnjoy the open road and courier goods with the Renegade Cargo vest. A special synthetic weave bestows the vest with incredible tensile strength that can support the custom 0.375 SCU pannier, while reinforced straps keep it secured to your back even while traversing rugged terrain.

tmbl_vest_racing_01_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU\n\nThe Renegade Racing vest provides protection against road rash without adding to your lap time. Graphene-based nanocomposite plating makes the vest extremely light yet ultra-durable. Ideal for everything from idyllic rides to heart pounding last laps.

turret_remote.description: Multitask on the battlefield with this remote turret system. Featuring precise controls and a wide field of fire, the turret allows pilots to add combat support to their resume.

ups_shoes_01_01_01.description: Nothing will take you back to the golden era club scene of Prime in the 2920s like Upsiders' new Edgerider sneakers. These slip-on sneakers feature daz patterning and modern impact cushioning to keep you up and active for days on end.

ups_shoes_02_01_01.description: Upsiders' Crestfall high-tops are slip-ons that blend suede and synthetic fabrics imbued with subtle patterns. They feature a deep U-cut collar, padded heel, and enlarged tongue.\n\nWomen's sizes currently out of stock.

xian_plant.description: One of the most iconic images of the Xi’An Empire in the UEE is the unblossomed Centennial Bloom. The growth of this plant is so precarious, even the slightest deviation in atmosphere or nourishment can offset its blooming period. Under sustained optimal conditions, the bloom takes a hundred years to live up to its name, blossoming small bellflowers of striking white and crimson.

adv_agent_shared.description:
Item Type: Light Armor
Damage Reduction: 20%

Virgil's TrueDef line of personal body armor provide strategic protection of vital areas while keeping you fast and mobile. Numerous planetary law enforcement organizations and even the Advocacy use versions of the TrueDef for their officers and agents.

adv_agent_helmet_01.description:
Item Type: Light Armor
Damage Reduction: 20%

Virgil's Argus helmet utilizes advanced multi-layered composite construction to provide incredible protection from weapon fire as well as environmental hazards. The tinted visor offers a wide field-of-view to improve situational awareness and unrestricted movement.

adv_agent_undersuit.description:
Item Type: Undersuit
Damage Reduction: 10%

Virgil's Guardian is a multi-purpose combat undersuit that features basic reinforced plates for impact protection as well as natural integration with compatible armor sets.

alb_jacket_02_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 3K µSCU\n\nPerfect for weathering any storm, Alejo Brothers' Softshell poncho is built from multi-layered waterproof weave technology and features an extra wide size to keep your personal gear clear and dry without restricting your arm movement.

alb_gloves_01.description: Maintain a tactile sense of the world while also keeping your hands safe and dry with the Deri fingerless gloves. Featuring a comfortable inner lining, lightweight plating on the back of the hand and slip resistant palm padding, the Deri gloves are an ideal choice for a wide variety of tasks.

alb_gloves_02_01_01.description: Whether engaged in work or play, the Parway gloves provide protection and the perfect fit. Synthetic leather cuffs overlap with a lightweight metal plate to offer protection from impacts. The fingers and palm mix fleece and a special perforated polymer to keep your hands dry and cool while still being able to interact with touchscreens.

alb_gloves_02_02_01.description: When you can't afford to fumble. Flexible polyweave provide excellent grip plus ablative ceramic demi-gaunt reinforcement and close-fit cuffs.

alb_gloves_02_02_10.description: When you can't afford to fumble. Flexible polyweave provide excellent grip plus ablative ceramic demi-gaunt reinforcement and close-fit cuffs. The Molten version is dyed a deep red to keep you subtle, but not unsightly.

alb_gloves_02_02_11.description: When you can't afford to fumble. Flexible polyweave provide excellent grip plus ablative ceramic demi-gaunt reinforcement and close-fit cuffs. The Sleet version is dyed a well-worn grey to keep you subtle, but not unsightly.

alb_gloves_02_02_15.description: When you can't afford to fumble. Flexible polyweave provide excellent grip plus ablative ceramic demi-gaunt reinforcement and close-fit cuffs. The Molehill version is dyed a neutral brown to keep you subtle, but not unsightly.

alb_gloves_02_02_18.description: When you can't afford to fumble. Flexible polyweave provide excellent grip plus ablative ceramic demi-gaunt reinforcement and close-fit cuffs. The Grime version is dyed a dusky blue to keep you subtle, but not unsightly.

alb_hat_01_01_01.description: Complete your cool-weather wardrobe with the classic Ketchum beanie from Alejo Brothers.

alb_hat_02_foundation01.description: Show your solidarity and commitment to forging a brighter future for the UEE with this Foundation Festival beanie. Made from high-quality cashmere spun on Angeli, this double layer beanie is ultrasoft, warm, and features the Foundation Festival logo on the front.

alb_jacket_03.description: Carrying Capacity: 5K µSCU\n\nThe Taberna jacket delivers refined design for rugged conditions. It features a weather resistant outer shell with additional paneling on the torso and arms. An integrated hood and shawl provide extra protection from the elements while a spacious toolbelt ensures gear remains within reach.

alb_jacket_04_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 400 µSCU\n\nThe heavy-duty Loscha Work Vest by Alejo Brothers is designed for people who want to be prepared for anything at any time.

alb_jacket_04_01_04.description: Carrying Capacity: 400 µSCU\n\nThe heavy-duty Loscha Work Vest by Alejo Brothers is designed for people who want to be prepared for anything at any time.

alb_jacket_04_01_10.description: Carrying Capacity: 400 µSCU\n\nThe heavy-duty Loscha Work Vest by Alejo Brothers is designed for people who want to be prepared for anything at any time.

alb_jacket_04_01_13.description: Carrying Capacity: 400 µSCU\n\nThe heavy-duty Loscha Work Vest by Alejo Brothers is designed for people who want to be prepared for anything at any time.

alb_jacket_04_01_17.description: Carrying Capacity: 400 µSCU\n\nThe heavy-duty Loscha Work Vest by Alejo Brothers is designed for people who want to be prepared for anything at any time.

alb_jacket_05_01_01.description: The durable Marshal sleeveless vest by Alejo Brothers is made to endure life on the frontier while distinct stylings like shoulder straps, bold cross-chest placket, and a high-collar make sure the wearer stands out on any far flung world.

alb_jacket_05_01_04.description: The durable Marshal sleeveless vest by Alejo Brothers is made to endure life on the frontier while distinct stylings like shoulder straps, bold cross-chest placket, and a high-collar make sure the wearer stands out on any far flung world.

alb_jacket_05_01_16.description: The durable Marshal sleeveless vest by Alejo Brothers is made to endure life on the frontier while distinct stylings like shoulder straps, bold cross-chest placket, and a high-collar make sure the wearer stands out on any far flung world.

alb_jacket_05_01_18.description: The durable Marshal sleeveless vest by Alejo Brothers is made to endure life on the frontier while distinct stylings like shoulder straps, bold cross-chest placket, and a high-collar make sure the wearer stands out on any far flung world.

alb_jacket_05_01_20.description: The durable Marshal sleeveless vest by Alejo Brothers is made to endure life on the frontier while distinct stylings like shoulder straps, bold cross-chest placket, and a high-collar make sure the wearer stands out on any far flung world.

alb_jumpsuit_01_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU\n\nThe Bannock jumpsuit combines comfort and durability. It features reinforced padding in critical areas, plenty of storage, and an adjustable belt to ensure a snug fit. Its unique design also includes a built-in secondary layer, allowing the wearer to unzip and cool down without fear of damaging their everyday clothes.

alb_mask_01.description: Fearlessly face any weather with the Taos balaclava and goggles. An ultra-soft inner lining provides warmth and comfort while a special exterior coating repels precipitation. The adjustable headband ensures an ideal fit, and the padding of the anti-fog goggles is integrated directly into the fabric to seal out the elements.

alb_mask_02.description: The Katla mask provides full face coverage from the elements or prying eyes. Oversized eyes provide a wide field of vision and a built-in air filter helps you breathe easy. Please note that this mask is not space-rated and should only be worn in naturally breathable environs.

alb_mask_03_01_01.description: Made for hostile environments, the Salluq Mask keeps dirt, dust, and grit out of your eyes while providing you with a wide field of vision. Please note that this mask is not space-rated and should only be worn in naturally breathable environments.

alb_pants_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU\n\nComfortable enough to wear all day yet designed to thrive under harsh conditions, the Tekaw pants are perfect whether you're on or off duty. Their stylish yet durable design includes a water-wicking coating and padded shins guards with wrappings that ensure a snug fit.

alb_pants_01_02_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 3K µSCU \n\nWhen you need to move like your life depends on it. Made from loose-fit tear-resistant polyweave with rigid greaves, these pants won't tie you up when things get tight.

alb_pants_01_02_10.description: Carrying Capacity: 3K µSCU \n\nWhen you need to move like your life depends on it. Made from loose-fit tear-resistant polyweave with rigid greaves, these pants won't tie you up when things get tight. The Molten version is dyed a deep red to keep you subtle, but not unsightly.

alb_pants_01_02_11.description: Carrying Capacity: 3K µSCU \n\nWhen you need to move like your life depends on it. Made from loose-fit tear-resistant polyweave with rigid greaves, these pants won't tie you up when things get tight. The Sleet version is dyed a well-worn grey to keep you subtle, but not unsightly.

alb_pants_01_02_15.description: Carrying Capacity: 3K µSCU \n\nWhen you need to move like your life depends on it. Made from loose-fit tear-resistant polyweave with rigid greaves, these pants won't tie you up when things get tight. The Molehill version is dyed a neutral brown to keep you subtle, but not unsightly.

alb_pants_01_02_18.description: Carrying Capacity: 3K µSCU \n\nWhen you need to move like your life depends on it. Made from loose-fit tear-resistant polyweave with rigid greaves, these pants won't tie you up when things get tight. The Grime version is dyed a dusky blue to keep you subtle, but not unsightly.

alb_pants_02_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 400 µSCU\n\nThe popular Slickdry Waders by Alejo Brothers are a combination of pants and boots made of a synthetic hydrophobic material and ensure the wearer will stay dry even if just stepping out of a river.

alb_pants_03.description: Carrying Capacity: 400 µSCU\n\nIf you're in the adventure business, you'll need clothing that can take the heat. The Allpa Pants were made with heavyweight cotton that features AlejoFlex technology, providing the wearer with a wide range of movement during tough jobs while maintaining its durability.

alb_pants_04.description: Carrying Capacity: 0.4K µSCU\n\nBe ready to take on whatever the day brings when wearing the Navoi. This unique piece integrates the pants perfectly into knee high boots. Made from a combination of synthetic materials to be tough yet comfortable, the Navoi also comes with shin pads and pouches strapped onto each leg.

alb_pants_04_01_04.description:
Carrying Capacity: 0.4K µSCU

Be ready to take on whatever the day brings when wearing the Navoi. This unique piece integrates the pants perfectly into knee high boots. Made from a combination of synthetic materials to be tough yet comfortable, the Navoi also comes with shin pads and pouches strapped onto each leg.

The Veritas edition is a bloody red, with black belts and leather straps.

alb_pants_04_05_01.description:
Carrying Capacity: 0.4K µSCU

Be ready to take on whatever the day brings when wearing the Navoi. This unique piece integrates the pants perfectly into knee high boots. Made from a combination of synthetic materials to be tough yet comfortable, the Navoi also comes with shin pads and pouches strapped onto each leg.

The Striker edition is a green camo with rust colored boots.

alb_shirt_01_01_01.description: Capable as being worn on its own or as a base for layers, this long-sleeve henley style shirt from Alejo Brothers keeps you stylish and comfortable.

alb_shirt_02_01_01.description: Alejo Brothers' classic loop tee with a spatter pattern.

alb_shirt_03_01_microtech.description: Capable as being worn on its own or as a base for layers, this long-sleeve henley style shirt decked out in microTech colors and branding keeps you stylish but comfortable.

alb_shirt_05.description: The rugged Amaris Shirt is a breathable long-sleeve shirt reinforced by raised fabric on the shoulders to create an elegant but industrial look.

alb_shirt_06.description: Habidash's Cassidy short-sleeved henley t-shirt features a lightweight, breathable fabric blend paired with a neck covering and separated arm sleeves for a stylish look that remains practical in dustier climates.

alb_shoes_01.description: The Alejo Brothers expertly engineered the Nivala shoes to provide high ankle support while remaining lightweight. The shoes mix the company's patented FullFlex rubber with synthetic nubuck leather for flexible yet strategic support, and feature cushioning on the heels and balls of the feet for supreme comfort.

banu_lum_gloves_01_01_01.description: The Good Gift gloves are made to match the festive sweater of the same name. These comfortable holiday hand warmers not only look good but are fingerless to make interacting with items a breeze.

banu_lum_jacket_01_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU\n\nThis Banu-made mock turtleneck lets you celebrate Luminalia in comfort and style. Cozy up around the lamp with this luxurious red and green fabric blend with an asymmetrical front and three adjustable straps that guarantee the perfect fit. Banu phrases calling for merriment and a prosperous future adorn the front and back in golden script.

banu_lum_jacket_01_02_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU\n\nThis Banu-made mock turtleneck lets you celebrate Luminalia in comfort and style. Cozy up around the lamp with this luxurious blue and grey fabric blend with an asymmetrical front and three adjustable straps that guarantee the perfect fit. Banu phrases calling for merriment and a prosperous future adorn the front and back in white script.

basl_combat_light_flightsuit_02_01_01.description:
Item Type: Racing Flight Suit
Damage Reduction: 5%
Temp. Rating: -30 / 60 °C
Radiation Protection: 15200 REM
Radiation Scrub Rate: 81 REM/s
G-Force Tolerance: +100%
Carrying Capacity: 8.0 µSCU

Featuring a deceptively simple design, the Ace Interceptor flight suit is jet black with reinforced grey protective padding on the arms and legs. Basilisk's renowned craftsmanship make this flight suit durable and supremely comfortable, leaving no mystery as to why it's widely used by top pilots across the empire.

basl_combat_light_helmet_02_01_01.description:
Item Type: Racing Helmet
Damage Reduction: 5%
Temp. Rating: -35 / 65 °C
Radiation Protection: 26000 REM
Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s

The unique open-faced design makes the Ace Interceptor helmet a lightweight and liberating option for operating in atmosphere. It features precisely layered plating to protect the head from a variety of combat and environmental hazards and an impact resistant, anti-glare visor over the eyes. Visor is AR crosshair compatible.

cba_boots_01_01_01.description: Temp. Rating: -35 / 15 °C\n\nThese rugged, high ankle boots will keep your feet warm when venturing into wintry conditions. The Cirrus also integrates steel alloy links into the sole for added traction on icy surfaces.

cba_boots_02_01_01.description: The Pampero are sleek ankle high boots feature lightweight yet durable soles to make it feel like you're walking on clouds even when trekking across the most unforgiving terrain.

cba_chef_hat_01_01_01.description: The Grammercy Food Service Cover is a standard food service accessory produced by Code Blue Apparel's professional division. Featuring a flexible one-size-fits-all form that expands or contracts firmly to the wearer's head, the hat design is both sleek and efficient.

cba_chef_jacket_01_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU\n\nThe Grammercy Food Service Jacket is a standard food service accessory produced by Code Blue Apparel's professional division. The jacket, first adapted from one of the company's bespoke surgeons coats, is the modern standard for chefs and line cooks. The jacket is constructed from a patented stain-resistant material that can be quickly cleaned.

cba_chef_pants_01_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 0.5K µSCU\n\nThe Grammercy Food Service Pants are a standard food service accessory produced by Code Blue Apparel's professional division. Designed to merge style and functionality, the pants offer support for all members of a food service team and are constructed from a patented stain-resistant material that can be quickly cleaned.

cba_chef_shoes_01_01_01.description: Code Blue Apparel's Variable Service Shoes are constructed from a rigid rubber-carbon splice that help provide protection from physical impacts or piercings. The exterior is sprayed with artileather for a professional finish and offers maximum ease-of-cleaning.

cba_doctor_jacket_01_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 0.4K µSCU\n\nYou can count on Code Blue Apparel to deliver professional and comfortable medical clothing. The Galen Surgical Scrub Top features a large pocket and a wide wrap across the mid-section for a secure fit. Made with a special anti-bacterial fabric that's 99% effective while also being lightweight and wrinkle free.

cba_doctor_pants_01_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 0.4K µSCU\n\nYou can count on Code Blue Apparel to deliver professional and comfortable medical clothing. The Galen Surgical Scrub Pants feature ribbing around the knees, and are made with a special anti-bacterial fabric that's 99% effective while also being lightweight and wrinkle free.

cba_gloves_01_01_01.description: Temp. Rating: -35 / 25 °C\n\nThe Arcus gloves are thin enough to wear on everyday excursions, yet capable of keeping your hands warm in frigid conditions. Textured touch fingertips even allow you to easily access your mobi and other touch screens without removing your gloves.

cba_gloves_02_01_01.description: Developed for work sites, but refined enough for everyday use, the Fractus gloves layer StretchStrong fabric for a tight yet breathable fit. Reinforced knuckle plating and scaled fingertips provide extra durability and a stylish flourish.

cba_jacket_01_01_01.description:
Temp. Rating: -35 / 10 °C
Carrying Capacity: 5K µSCU

Be bold and brave the cold in frigid conditions up to -35 °C with the Cumulus's special thermal lining. An oversized, insulated hood provides additional protection around the head, while the distinct quilted torso stops snow, ice, and wind from seeping in, ensuring the wearer remains warm and dry.

cba_jacket_02_01_01.description:
Temp. Rating: -20 / 20 °C
Carrying Capacity: 3K µSCU

Even though it's rated to withstand arctic conditions, you won't want any snow accumulating on this distinct and dazzling jacket. The Stratus will keep you warm from neck to knees thanks to its high collar and precisely layered pieces.

cba_mask_01_01_01.description: Temp. Rating: -30 / 15 °C\n\nThe Col is an insulated yet lightweight head cover that keeps heat from escaping. The large, chip-resistant faceplate features a cutting-edge GX coating to ensure the purest light quality for viewing the surrounding environs.

cba_mask_02_01_01.description: Temp. Rating: -30 / 15 °C\n\nProtect your head from the wind and cold with the Gale. Code Blue Apparel paired a wide-view visor with a dynamic synthetic fabric to create an excellent thermal barrier to keep heat from escaping without sacrificing your visibility.

cba_medical_gown_01_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 0.4K µSCU\n\nThe GME 338-10 Medical Gown is the de facto medical gown assigned to in-patients at hospitals and other care facilities across the Empire. This standard gown was designed so that patients could be dressed or undressed easily, and made with antibacterial fabric to help facilitate keeping wounds clean, lowering the risk of infection.

cba_medical_slippers_01_01_01.description: The standard GME 240-15 Patient Slippers offer necessary foot protection and comfort during a patient's visit to a medical facility. Constructed from the same antibacterial fabric as the GME 338-10 Medical Gown, the slippers feature an easy on/off design and an anti-slip coating on the sole.

cba_nurse_pants_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 0.5K µSCU\n\nThe Mahoney Nurse Scrub Pants are made for medical professionals looking for a comfortable but durable fit. They feature two front pockets and a stretch waistband. Moisture wicking and anti-stain fabric makes these pants ready to withstand long shifts and repeated washing.

cba_nurse_scrubs_01_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 0.4K µSCU\n\nThe Mahoney Nurse Scrub shirt is made for medical professionals looking an accommodating and comfortable fit. This top has a pocket and strips of fabric forming subtle geometric patterns on the right shoulder. It's also made with moisture wicking and anti-stain fabric ready to withstand long shifts and repeated washing.

cba_pants_01_01_01.description:
Temp. Rating: -35 / 15 °C
Carrying Capacity: 3K µSCU

Be bold and brave the cold with Cumulus pants. Designed with a synthetic fabric that insulates the inside and wicks away moisture from the outside, these pants provide protection against temperature drops to -35 °C.

cba_pants_02_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 0.5K µSCU\n\nCasual comfort that you can wear anywhere. The Stratus pants feature a soft comfort waistband that perfectly embraces your hips, and distinct reinforced paneling to ensure long wear and supreme style.

cba_security_hat_01_01_01.description: This black soft-domed, billed hat from Code Blue Apparel features eye-catching bronze accents and is imprinted boldly with "Security" across the front. Comfortable and distinct, it makes for an ideal accessory to any security professional's uniform.

cba_security_jacket_01_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 2K µSCU\n\nThe Ajax Security Uniform Jacket is a standard security accessory produced by Code Blue Apparel's professional division. The jacket is a uniform intended for security professionals and does not provide any armored protection.

cba_security_pants_01_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 0.5K µSCU\n\nThe Ajax Security Uniform Pants are a standard security accessory produced by Code Blue Apparel's professional division. Flexible and durable, the pants are designed to match the Ajax Security Uniform Jacket and feature the same high-visibility piping. The pants are flexible and allow for a full range of motion.

cba_security_shoes_01_01_01.description: Ajax Security Uniform Shoes are a standard security accessory produced by Code Blue Apparel's professional division. The boot-styled shoes feature a unique thick-body construction that increases durability in exchange for overall bulk. A heavy-duty rubberized exterior protects the shoes from weather and general day-to-day wear.

cba_surgeon_dress_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU\n\nEnsure complete upper body coverage and comfort with the Shizhen surgical gown. Its unique design features a light, breathable long sleeve shirt underneath a see through surgical gown, delivering dual layer protection against fluids and pathogens.

cba_surgeon_gloves_01.description: The Ignaz surgical gloves are sterile and strong without sacrifice the manual dexterity necessary for delicate surgeries. Made with a special anti-puncture material and featuring a beaded cuff that guarantees a snug fit, the inside of the glove is also coated with a special gel to keep your hands from drying and cracking.

cba_surgeon_mask_01.description: The Shizhen surgical head cover provides complete coverage during medical procedures. Lightweight, breathable and anti-bacterial, the head cover even includes a tinted lens to reduce heat and eye strain that may occur during procedures involving lasers.

cba_surgeon_pants_01.description: Carrying Capacity: .05K µSCU\n\nComfortable, lightweight, and breathable are the top three traits surgeons look for in their work pants, so CBA started there. The Taussig are not only comfortable to wear but are made from an antibacterial and anti-rip fabric that provides excellent protection against fluids, pathogens, and other hazards of the job.

cba_surgeon_shoes_01_01_01.description: The Lister surgical shoes are designed to provide comfort and support even after hours on your feet. Made out of a crisp white material for easy identification of contamination, the shoes feature padded insoles and are made from a proprietary material that's both breathable and antibacterial.

cbd_gloves_01.description: Originally made for open-canopy racers, the Grappler gloves became beloved for their versatility and durability. Their mix of leather and synthetic fabrics make for a lightweight and warm wear. They also feature an adjustable strap to guarantee the perfect fit, and a special tactile fingertip design so wearers don't have to remove the gloves to interact with screens.

cbd_gloves_01_01_04.description: Originally made for open-canopy racers, the Grappler gloves became beloved for their versatility and durability. Their mix of leather and synthetic fabrics make for a lightweight and warm wear. They also feature an adjustable strap to guarantee the perfect fit, and a special tactile fingertip design so wearers don't have to remove the gloves to interact with screens.\n\nThe Veritas edition is a bloody red, with black belts and leather straps.

cbd_hat_02_01_centurion.description: The MC-Pinhead military cadet hat from CBD features metal bullet studs embedded into its panels. The special Voyager edition comes in red with a gold band. \n\nWomen's sizes currently out of stock.

cbd_hat_03_01_cfp.description: A comfortable blue and black cadet hat with the CFP's logo on the front.

cbd_hat_03_01_cargo.description: The front panel of this grey cadet hat features Cargo written in yellow and purple. A bright band of yellow also rings the hat to make it highly visible from a distance.

cbd_hat_03_01_fleetweek2021.description: Show your support for the Navy and the brave souls that serve the Empire with this classic cadet hat commemorating Invictus Launch Week.

cbd_hat_03_arccorp_01.description: A red and gray cadet hat with ArcCorp's name and logo emblazoned across the front panel.

cbd_hat_03_iae2020.description: Boast about attending the UEE's most prominent ship showcase with the official hat of the 2950 Intergalactic Aerospace Expo. This grey cadet hat has the logo across the front panel and as a pop of color on the back.

cbd_hat_03_microtech_01.description: A blue, green, and gray cadet hat with microTech's name and logo emblazoned across the front panel.

cbd_hat_03_sakurasun_01.description: A purple and pink cadet hat with Sakura Sun's name and logo emblazoned across the front panel.

cbd_hat_03_aegis_dec.description: This two-tone cap is mainly dark grey with a light grey accent stripe, featuring an Aegis Dynamics patch across the front panel.

cbd_hat_03_anvil_dec.description: A dark green Anvil Aerospace cap that features metal eyelets on the side.

cbd_hat_03_argo_dec.description: Spacecraft manufacturer Argo Astronautics has been around for centuries. Support this indispensable UEE industrial brand by wearing this burnt orange hat bearing their name across the front.

cbd_hat_03_asd_01.description: A red and green cadet hat with ASD's name and logo emblazoned across the front panel.

cbd_hat_03_asd_10.description: A white and black cadet hat with ASD's name and logo emblazoned across the front panel.

cbd_hat_03_consolidated_dec.description: Consolidated Outland thrives on the edge of innovation. Promote their initiative by wearing this dark grey hat with the company's branding gracing the front panel.

cbd_hat_03_crusader_01.description: A blue, white, and gray cadet hat with Crusader Industries' name and logo emblazoned across the front panel.

cbd_hat_03_crusader_dec.description: To celebrate Pax Humana 2949, Crusader Industries released this hat in the colors associated with the holiday, blue and white. Wear this hat to join the company in supporting those that focus on the greater good. All proceeds from its purchase will go to the Terra-based nonprofit Empire's Overlooked.

cbd_hat_03_cvx01_01.description: A black cadet hat with Covalex's name and logo emblazoned across the front and back panels.

cbd_hat_03_defcon2956.description: Show your appreciation for the everyday heroes of the UEE with the official DefenseCon 2956 hat.

cbd_hat_03_drake_03.description: Embody the boldness of Drake Interplanetary by wearing this black hat with the company's name in strong red lettering.

cbd_hat_03_drake_dec.description: Embody the boldness of Drake Interplanetary by wearing this black hat with the company's name in strong yellow lettering.

cbd_hat_03_expo_dec.description: A magenta hat emblazoned with the Intergalactic Aerospace Expo name and logo in white on the front.

cbd_hat_03_fleetweek2023_11.description: A classic grey cadet hat commemorating Invictus Launch Week and featuring the silhouette of a ship across the front.

cbd_hat_03_fleetweek2023_17.description: A classic blue cadet hat commemorating Invictus Launch Week and featuring the silhouette of a ship across the front.

cbd_hat_03_fleetweek2025anvil.description: This dark green cadet hat is decorated with two diagonal yellow stripes, representing celebrated ship manufacturer Anvil Aerospace.

cbd_hat_03_fleetweek2025argo.description: This dark gray cadet hat features a stylized, understated version of Argo's logo on the front.

cbd_hat_03_fleetweek2025invictus.description: A classic cadet hat commemorating Invictus Launch Week. It features the Invictus logo across the front and back.

cbd_hat_03_fleetweek2025misc.description: This blue and white cadet hat features a minimalistic version of MISC's logo on the front.

cbd_hat_03_fleetweek_dec.description: Show your support for the Navy and the brave souls that serve the Empire with this classic cadet hat commemorating Invictus Launch Week.

cbd_hat_03_foundation01.description: Celebrate the nations of Earth joining together to explore the stars with this special Foundation Festival hat featuring the logo across the front panel.

cbd_hat_03_hd_01.description: A brown and gray cadet hat with Hurston Dynamics' name and logo emblazoned across the front panel.

cbd_hat_03_iae2021_07.description: The official hat of the 2951 IAE carries the logo for the event on the front and a smaller version of it on the back right panel.

cbd_hat_03_iae2021_10.description: The official hat of the 2951 IAE carries the logo for the event on the front and a smaller version of it on the back right panel.

cbd_hat_03_iae2022_02.description: A red cadet hat celebrating the 2952 Intergalactic Aerospace Expo featuring the event's logo across the front.

cbd_hat_03_iae2022_12.description: A black cadet hat celebrating the 2952 Intergalactic Aerospace Expo featuring the event's logo across the front.

cbd_hat_03_iae2023_10.description: Celebrate the UEE's premier ship expo with the official hat of the 2953 Intergalactic Aerospace Expo. This purple hat displays the IAE logo on the front and back.

cbd_hat_03_iae2023_19.description: Celebrate the UEE's premier ship expo with the official hat of the 2953 Intergalactic Aerospace Expo. This white hat displays the IAE logo on the front and back.

cbd_hat_03_iae2024_10.description: The official hat of the 2954 Intergalactic Aerospace Expo is a crisp white with the logo across the front.

cbd_hat_03_iae2024_19.description: The official hat of the 2954 Intergalactic Aerospace Expo is a vibrant purple with the logo across the front.

cbd_hat_03_iae2025_10.description: The official hat of the 2955 Intergalactic Aerospace Expo features gray fabric with the logo across the front.

cbd_hat_03_iae2025_12.description: The official hat of the 2955 Intergalactic Aerospace Expo features black fabric with the logo across the front.

cbd_hat_03_itg_01.description: A blue and black cadet hat with the Interstellar Transport Guild's name and logo emblazoned across the front and back panels.

cbd_hat_03_ling_01.description: A red and white cadet hat with Ling Family Hauling's name and logo emblazoned across the front and back panels.

cbd_hat_03_misc_dec.description: Evoke the industrial spirit of MISC by sporting this tan hat featuring the company's emblem.

cbd_hat_03_origin_dec.description: This light grey hat featuring Origin's name and signature logo is a perennial best seller at their showroom in New Austin.

cbd_hat_03_redwind_01.description: A gray cadet hat with Red Wind Linehaul's name and logo emblazoned across the front and back panels.

cbd_hat_03_rsi_dec.description: The iconic RSI logo graces the front panel of this black hat featuring a burnt orange accent stripe.

cbd_hat_03_taba_01.description: A black and white cadet hat with TABA Freightline's name and logo emblazoned across the front and back panels.

cbd_hat_03_tumbril_01.description: Tumbril Land Systems made this hat to celebrate the release of their legendary Nova tank to the civilian market.

cbd_hat_03_unified_01.description: A blue and red cadet hat with Unified Distribution Management's name and logo emblazoned across the front and back panels.

cbd_jacket_05.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU\n\nEmbody the hardcore attitude with the Misfit jacket. Durable synthetic leather combines with anarchic stylings for a jacket meant to send a message. Its distinct look includes spikes across the shoulder and right arm, two buckled straps on the left arm, and a badass image on the back highlighted by three lights powered via electronic boxes affixed to the front.

cbd_jacket_05_01_04.description:
Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU

Embody the hardcore attitude with the Misfit jacket. Durable synthetic leather combines with anarchic stylings for a jacket meant to send a message. Its distinct look includes spikes across the shoulder and right arm, two buckled straps on the left arm, and a badass image on the back highlighted by three lights powered via electronic boxes affixed to the front.

The Veritas edition is a bloody red, with a kopion's spine and ribcage printed along the back.

cbd_jacket_05_05_01.description:
Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU

Embody the hardcore attitude with the Misfit jacket. Durable synthetic leather combines with anarchic stylings for a jacket meant to send a message. Its distinct look includes spikes across the shoulder and right arm, two buckled straps on the left arm, and a badass image on the back highlighted by three lights powered via electronic boxes affixed to the front.

Favored by members of the infamous Headhunters gang, the Bonefire edition features a stylized image of skulls and spines surrounded by red streaks on the back.

cbd_jacket_05_06_01.description:
Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU

Embody the hardcore attitude with the Misfit jacket. Durable synthetic leather combines with anarchic stylings for a jacket meant to send a message. Its distinct look includes spikes across the shoulder and right arm, two buckled straps on the left arm, and a badass image on the back highlighted by three lights powered via electronic boxes affixed to the front.

The Striker edition is a green camo with a white bone pattern on the back.

cbd_mask_01.description: The Chrome Dome was designed to make hostile environments manageable. This unique head gear features a lightweight and reflective hat with a sloped brim, goggles that automatically adjust to lighting conditions, large ear flaps, and a neck gaiter to cover the face. Whether trudging through snow or sand, the Chrome Dome is ready to brave the elements with you.

cbd_mask_01_01_04.description: The Chrome Dome was designed to make hostile environments manageable. This unique head gear features a lightweight and reflective hat with a sloped brim, goggles that automatically adjust to lighting conditions, large ear flaps, and a neck gaiter to cover the face. Whether trudging through snow or sand, the Chrome Dome is ready to brave the elements with you.\n\nThe Minefield edition features metal rivet detailing.

cbd_mask_01_05_01.description: The Chrome Dome was designed to make hostile environments manageable. This unique head gear features a lightweight helmet with a sloped brim, goggles that automatically adjust to lighting conditions, large ear flaps, and a neck gaiter to cover the face. Whether trudging through snow or sand, the Chrome Dome is ready to brave the elements with you.\n\nThe Striker edition is a rust color with silver and gold rivets.

cbd_pants_02_01_01.description:
Carrying Capacity: 4K µSCU

The Franz monochrome striped pants from CBD are elevated with the addition of bold black brush strokes applied freehand.

Men's sizes currently not available.

cbd_pants_05.description: Made with soft yet sturdy cotton, these jeans are ripped and then "repaired" with colorful thread alongside misshapen patches that give them a touch of history.

ccc_bear_helmet_01_01_01.description:
Item Type: Flight Helmet
Damage Reduction: 10%
Temp. Rating: -40 / 60 °C
Radiation Protection: 15200 REM
Radiation Scrub Rate: 81 REM/s

Celebrate Day of the Vara in sinister style with this officially licensed Fieldsbury Dark Bear helmet. This twisted version of the Fieldsbury Bear mascot launched a seasonal soda flavor before being co-opted into a series of high-profile pranks. Ever since, the bear's big, toothy grin and off-set flickering eyes have become a standard sight at Day of the Vara celebrations. Now CC's Conversions has designed and delivered an official, high quality reproduction of this iconic mascot, available in six striking colors.

ccc_combat_heavy_helmet_01.description:
Item Type: Heavy Armor
Damage Reduction: 40%
Temp. Rating: -90 / 115 °C
Radiation Protection: 52800 REM
Radiation Scrub Rate: 251.1 REM/s

Modern and ancient armor converge with the Berserker helmet. This wildly original armor from CC's Conversions features golden horns and wings, plus a face covering inspired by lamellar armor. Beneath these unique aesthetic flourishes, this heavy helmet provides supreme protection with plating that extends low enough to protect your neck. Visor is AR crosshair compatible.

ccc_heavy_armor_helmet_01.description:
Item Type: Heavy Armor
Damage Reduction: 40%
Temp. Rating: -80 / 110 °C
Radiation Protection: 52800 REM
Radiation Scrub Rate: 251.1 REM/s

Show that you serve no master with the Neoni helmet. Drawing inspiration from monster myths and warrior cultures of old, this menacing visage courtesy of CC's Conversions features a dramatic paint job, fang-filled grin, and pointed holographic horns, providing protection and intimidation in one memorable helmet. Visor is AR crosshair compatible.

Item Type: Medium Armor
Damage Reduction: 30%
Temp. Rating: -61 / 91 °C
Radiation Protection: 26400 REM
Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s

Honor and embody the Tevarin aesthetic with the Aves armor. Cutting edge manufacturing techniques were used to place white, red, grey, and black plating perfectly to fit the Human form and evoke the shape language imbued into the Tevarin's iconic ships. This medium armor from CC's Conversions is both sensational and practical, providing solid protection while keeping you light on your feet. When paired with the Aves helmet, the suit combines for a striking and unforgettable look.

ccc_scarecrow_helmet_01_01_01.description:
Item Type: Flight Helmet
Damage Reduction: 10%
Temp. Rating: -30 / 60 °C
Radiation Protection: 15200 REM
Radiation Scrub Rate: 81 REM/s

Haunt your friends with a helmet inspired by the terrifying appearance adopted by famed serial killer Neville Lott. The classic slasher vid 'The Hill Horror' helped make this look a staple at Day of the Vara festivals, and this high-quality reproduction replicates the iconic movie look down to every last devious stitch. The Hill Horror helmet is made with an actual gunny sack sealed with a special finish that can withstand a wide variety of environmental conditions, and covering a comfortable space-rate helmet. Become a walking nightmare and celebrate Day of the Vara in sinister style with this helmet.

ccc_scarecrow_helmet_01_01_12.description:
Item Type: Flight Helmet
Damage Reduction: 10%
Temp. Rating: -30 / 60 °C
Radiation Protection: 15200 REM
Radiation Scrub Rate: 81 REM/s

Haunt your friends with this custom, high-quality reproduction of the terrifying helmet from the popular slasher vid 'The Hill Horror Reborn.' Inspired by the terrifying appearance of notorious serial killer Neville Lott, this collector's edition space-safe helmet replicates the killer's look in the second vid of the series with a black gunny sack and neon green lights. Now you can celebrate Day of the Vara in sinister style, while standing apart from other menaces.

ccc_vanduul_helmet_01_01_01.description:
Item Type: Flight Helmet
Damage Reduction: 10%
Temp. Rating: -30 / 60 °C
Radiation Protection: 15200 REM
Radiation Scrub Rate: 81 REM/s

With the Snarling Vanduul helmet, CC's Conversions developed a special space-age vulcanized silicone rubber to replicate everything from the Vanduul's menacing smile to the ridges on the back of its head. Molded over a lightweight flight helmet, this Vanduul visage is wearable both in and out of atmosphere, allowing you to be the ultimate space invader wherever you celebrate Day of the Vara.

ccc_viral_helmet_01_01_01.description:
Item Type: Flight Helmet
Damage Reduction: 10%
Temp. Rating: -40 / 60 °C
Radiation Protection: 15200 REM
Radiation Scrub Rate: 81 REM/s

Infect your friends with your Day of the Vara spirit when you wear this helmet inspired by the hit vid Lost Plague. The helmet perfectly replicates the horrific death of xenoarchaeologist Diane Wu, first victim of the ancient alien virus she unwittingly unleashes on an unsuspecting galaxy. CC's Conversions utilized a proprietary lightweight yet sturdy rubber to accurately reproduce the deadly plague's signature spines so you can enjoy hours of wear without straining your neck.

Item Type: Heavy Armor
Damage Reduction: 40%
Temp. Rating: -80 / 105 °C
Radiation Protection: 52800 REM

Based on CDS' ADP-mk4 heavy combat armor, this set has been modified from its original form. When there's a difficult job at hand, you want to ensure that you can see it through to the end. This  armor allows Marines to remain in active combat situations for a longer duration with more loadout options, while its powered frame provides near unfettered movement despite the protection it offers.

cds_armor_heavy_arms_03.description:
Item Type: Heavy Armor
Damage Reduction: 40%
Temp. Rating: -70 / 100 °C
Radiation Protection: 52800 REM
Radiation Scrub Rate: 251.1 REM/s

Endure the most brutal attacks with the DCP heavy armor. This set features easy-swing joints that provide freedom of movement in the heat of battle, and was crafted with a multi-layer shock-absorbing shell that helps its wearer shake off the hardest hits.

Revolutionary when first released, the ADP heavy armor system was heralded as the pinnacle of personal protection. Clark Defense Systems' maximalist design provides plenty of attachment points and excellent protection against the elements and enemy fire. CDS refined and reshaped the ADP line over the years, but many still consider the original ADP to be the touchstone of military-grade heavy armor. The Hurston Edition was made specifically for the company's security services.
